https://it.linkedin.com/jobs/view/corpor.reasoning: Il candidato possiede un profilo tecnico e accademico d'eccellenza (CFA winner, 110L) con competenze in financial modeling e Bloomberg perfettamente in linea con il ruolo. Tuttavia, il fit è limitato dalla sua esplicita dichiarazione di non interesse per posizioni in Investment Banking, settore che definisce la divisione GCIB di MUFG.

job_data.title: Marketing Associate
job_data.descriptionHtml:
Company Description

Investa Solutions is a Geneva-based boutique that offers access to private equity investments to professional investors — executing 30–40 deals per year across asset classes. We are a small, fast-moving team that runs lean and thinks in systems. We're building our marketing function from scratch, and we want someone who can shape it.


Role Description

This is a full-time role, initially fully remote but based around Milan.


You will own Investa's external presence across every channel — from creating an investment teaser to set up a client event - and anything in between. This is not a coordinator role. We want someone who can think strategically about brand positioning in a regulated, institutional context, execute with discipline, and bring genuine creativity to how we keep Investa top of mind with professional investors and partners.


We are strong believers in tech and automation, this role will have the opportunity to help build a AI-native marketing machine!


What you will do

  • Own the content and production of investment teasers, one-pagers, pitch decks, and investor presentations — working closely with the deal team on tone and substance
  • Plan, coordinate, and run webinars and investor events end-to-end: logistics, speaker prep, platform setup, post-event follow-up
  • Write and send investor email campaigns and newsletters with a clear commercial logic behind each send
  • Partner with brand agencies to develop and execute brand activation ideas that keep Investa relevant and distinctive in a crowded market — think beyond standard financial services conventions
  • Build and iterate on marketing automations using AI tools to scale output without adding headcount
  • Track performance metrics across channels and translate data into actions, not reports
  • Manage marketing assets across platforms (Canva, MailChimp, etc.) and maintain consistency across brand touchpoints
  • Identify emerging channels — LinkedIn, short-form video, podcasts, thought leadership — and test what earns attention from professional audiences



What we are looking for

  • Demonstrable experience across both brand and performance marketing — you can write a compelling narrative and read a dashboard with equal comfort
  • Genuine interest in finance or private equity — you don't need to be an analyst, but you need to be curious about the industry and credible in front of sophisticated investors
  • A hands-on relationship with AI tools: you use them daily, you know their limits, and you are always looking for the next automation that saves an hour
  • Strong visual judgment — experience with Canva or similar tools, and an eye for what looks institutional versus what looks amateur
  • Data-driven instincts: you measure what matters, and you are not satisfied with vanity metrics
  • A bias toward action and ownership — we are a small team and there is no one waiting to review your calendar
  • 5+ years of relevant experience in marketing, ideally in financial services, B2B, or a fast-moving startup context
  • Fully fluency in English required. Italian and French a very nice to have.


What we offer

  • Full remote flexibility — we are headquartered in Geneva, you can be based anywhere in the Milan area
  • Direct exposure to senior deal-making, investor relations, and a genuinely interesting product — private equity for professional investors is not a commodity market
  • An AI-first working environment where you will be encouraged to automate aggressively and work with the latest tools
  • Exposure to a working environment shaped around best practices from the biggest companies (JP Morgan, Amazon, Bain&Co), but with a human touch
  • A lean team where your output is visible and your ideas are heard from day one
  • Room to grow as the function and teh company scales
  • Competitive compensation

job_data.title: SGR Private Equity Accountant
job_data.descriptionHtml:
Per importante SGR italiana di Private Equity, siamo alla ricerca di un Accountant da inserire all'interno del team di Amministrazione.


A supporto delle figure senior, la risorsa si occupa della gestione contabile e amministrativa della SGR, garantendo la corretta tenuta della contabilità e la produzione della reportistica finanziaria, interfacciandosi regolarmente con la banca depositaria e le funzioni interne.


· Gestione della contabilità giornaliera del fondo e calcolo periodico del NAV (Net Asset Value), attraverso l’inserimento, l’aggiornamento e la riconciliazione dei dati nel gestionale contabile;

· Collaborazione con la banca depositaria per le verifiche contabili e supporto operativo al team di investimento nella gestione delle operazioni societarie e delle movimentazioni del fondo;

· Redazione della reportistica amministrativa e contabile direzionale, tra cui i rendiconti per Banca d’Italia, i report IPEV per la valutazione delle partecipazioni, e la reportistica ESG legata ai criteri di sostenibilità dei portafogli;

· Partecipazione a progetti di miglioramento dei processi contabili e amministrativi, con focus sull’efficienza, automazione e qualità del dato.


Requisiti

· Laurea in Economia, Amministrazione Aziendale o discipline equivalenti;

· 1-2 anni di esperienza maturata presso società di revisione;

· Ottima conoscenza di Excel e dei sistemi gestionali per la contabilità;

· Precisione, capacità analitica e orientamento al dettaglio;

· Buona conoscenza della lingua inglese, scritta e parlata.


Altre informazioni

Sede: Milano


L’annuncio è rivolto ad ambo i sessi (D.lgs n. 198/2006) e nel rispetto di quanto disposto dall’art. 10 del D.Lgs n. 276/2003. I candidati sono invitati a leggere l’informativa privacy https://www.wexecutive.eu/privacy-policy ai sensi dell'art. 13 e art. 14 del Regolamento UE 2016/679 sulla protezione dei dati. Aut. Min. Prot. R.0000155 del 31/12/2021.

job_data.title: M&A Senior Analyst | Financial due diligence
job_data.descriptionHtml:
La risorsa sarà impegnata nell'analisi di dossier di Financial Due Diligence su operazioni di M&A interfacciandosi direttamente con le parti interessate e contribuendo al coordinamento di risorse junior.

Dettagli sul cliente

Boutique di M&A con crescente specializzazione in operazioni di buy & build per investitori finanziari, club deal e family office.

Descrizione

  • esecuzione operativa di financial due diligence
  • analisi economico finanziarie approfondite con gestione e revisione di modelli
  • coordinamento risorse junior
  • gestione autonoma delle criticità che emergono durante le analisi
  • collaborazione trasversale sull'intero processo di M&A
  • partecipazione attiva alle operazioni fino al closing interfacciandosi con gli interlocutori esterni

Profilo del Candidato

  • Laurea magistrale in Economia (o discipline affini)
  • Esperienza in Financial Due Diligence / Transaction Services / M&A Advisory
  • Ottima conoscenza di Excel
  • Autonomia operativa e buone capacità di problem solving
  • Ottime capacità relazionali
  • Capacità di lavorare per obiettivi legati alle singole operazioni

offerta di lavoro

Ottima opportunità di crescita in contesto flessibile e strutturato.

job_data.title: Investment Banking M&A Senior Analyst | Industrials, Automotive and Defence
job_data.descriptionHtml:
Mediobanca is an established, specialized financial operator operating in Wealth Management, Corporate & Investment Banking and Consumer Finance, with an unparalleled reputation in the Italian market, consolidated by an acknowledged responsible approach to banking, the high professionalism of staff, and the excellence of the services offer.


We are looking for a motivated and proactive Senior Analyst to join Mediobanca’s Corporate Finance division within the Industrials, Automotive and Defence M&A team, based in Milan. As a Senior Analyst, you will support both origination and execution across cross-border transactions, contributing to client relationships and deal delivery within one of the most active sector teams at Mediobanca.


Key Responsibilities:

  • Perform financial analysis, valuations, and advanced financial modelling for M&A transactions across Industrials, Automotive and Defence sectors.
  • Prepare high-quality client materials, including pitch books, information memoranda and execution documentation.
  • Conduct detailed company and industry research, developing sector insights across OEMs, components, capital goods and mobility.
  • Analyse potential acquisition targets and assess strategic and financial capacity of prospective buyers.
  • Constant monitor M&A, equity, and debt capital markets, with a focus on sector-specific dynamics and trends.



Requirements

The ideal candidate is self-motivated, reliable, and a strong team player with excellent interpersonal skills:

  • Minimum 3 years of relevant experience in Investment Banking, with prior exposure to Industrials, Automotive and/or Defence transactions.
  • Strong technical skills in financial modeling and valuation methodologies.
  • Excellent organisational skills, with the ability to manage multiple workstreams under tick deadlines.
  • Strong written and verbal communication skills.
  • Fluency in Italian and English.
  • Team-oriented mindset with high attention to detail and a proactive approach.
  • Bachelor's or Master's degree in Finance, Business Administration, Engineering, or a related field from a top-tier university or business school.


Diversity & Inclusion are core values for Mediobanca. All applications are welcome; we value age, background, ability, personal orientation and gender expression diversity.
job_data.descriptionText:
Mediobanca is an established, specialized financial operator operating in Wealth Management, Corporate & Investment Banking and Consumer Finance, with an unparalleled reputation in the Italian market, consolidated by an acknowledged responsible approach to banking, the high professionalism of staff, and the excellence of the services offer.
We are looking for a motivated and proactive Senior Analyst to join Mediobanca’s Corporate Finance division within the Industrials, Automotive and Defence M&A team, based in Milan. As a Senior Analyst, you will support both origination and execution across cross-border transactions, contributing to client relationships and deal delivery within one of the most active sector teams at Mediobanca.
Key Responsibilities:Perform financial analysis, valuations, and advanced financial modelling for M&A transactions across Industrials, Automotive and Defence sectors.Prepare high-quality client materials, including pitch books, information memoranda and execution documentation.Conduct detailed company and industry research, developing sector insights across OEMs, components, capital goods and mobility.Analyse potential acquisition targets and assess strategic and financial capacity of prospective buyers.Constant monitor M&A, equity, and debt capital markets, with a focus on sector-specific dynamics and trends.

RequirementsThe ideal candidate is self-motivated, reliable, and a strong team player with excellent interpersonal skills:Minimum 3 years of relevant experience in Investment Banking, with prior exposure to Industrials, Automotive and/or Defence transactions.Strong technical skills in financial modeling and valuation methodologies.Excellent organisational skills, with the ability to manage multiple workstreams under tick deadlines.Strong written and verbal communication skills.Fluency in Italian and English.Team-oriented mindset with high attention to detail and a proactive approach.Bachelor's or Master's degree in Finance, Business Administration, Engineering, or a related field from a top-tier university or business school.
Diversity & Inclusion are core values for Mediobanca. All applications are welcome; we value age, background, ability, personal orientation and gender expression diversity.

https://it.linkedin.com/jobs/view/invest.reasoning: Nonostante l'eccellente background accademico e tecnico, il candidato manca dei 3 anni di esperienza specifica in Investment Banking richiesti per il ruolo Senior. Inoltre, Matteo dichiara esplicitamente di non essere interessato a posizioni in Investment Banking, rendendo il fit nullo sotto il profilo motivazionale.

job_data.title: M&A Analyst
job_data.descriptionHtml:
Responsibilities

Société Générale Corporate & Investment Banking (SG CIB) is the investment banking arm of Société Générale, one of the largest banking Group in the Eurozone and a leading player in the European capital markets. Combining innovation, quality of execution and local teams, SG CIB offers value-added integrated financial solutions for clients.

The Analyst will be part of Société Générale CIB M&A team based in Milan.

Tasks and responsibilities:

  • Building complex financial models and completing valuation, mergers and other analytical exercises
  • Drafting of presentations for M&A transactions or strategic client dialogue
  • Working closely with the rest of Team to create client deliverables and meet ad-hoc client requests
  • Closely collaborating with various industries, countries and other products’ colleagues during origination and execution stages
  • Perform industry and company research to support business development and on an ad-hoc basis

Profile required

Studies & experience:

  • A well-rounded academic background from a top tier educational institution
  • At least two years of experience of Investment Banking at a recognized Investment Bank or M&A Advisory boutique

Language skills:

  • Native level of Italian
  • Proficiency in English

Technical, operational & Soft skills:

  • Proficiency in MS office applications
  • Technically proficient in financial modeling (DCF, Multiples, Merger model, LBO model)
  • Analytical approach to problem solving
  • High level of accuracy and attention to details
  • Strong work ethic
  • Strong presentation and communication skills
  • Good interpersonal skils
  • Ability to work in a team as well as independently

Why join us

Société Générale Italy is a multi-category bank offering every employee the possibility to have several careers in a professional career path. Internal mobility and training are two core areas we focus on, in a dynamic, prosperous and evolving context.

Business insight

At Société Générale, we are convinced that people are drivers of change, and that the world of tomorrow will be shaped by all their initiatives, from the smallest to the most ambitious.

Whether you’re joining us for a period of months, years or your entire career, together we can have a positive impact on the future. Creating, daring, innovating and taking action are part of our DNA.

If you too want to be directly involved, grow in a stimulating and caring environment, feel useful on a daily basis and develop or strengthen your expertise, you will feel right at home with us!

Still hesitating?

You should know that our employees can dedicate several days per year to solidarity actions during their working hours, including sponsoring people struggling with their orientation or professional integration, participating in the financial education of young apprentices, and sharing their skills with charities. There are many ways to get involved.

Diversity and Inclusion

We are an equal opportunities employer and we are proud to make diversity a strength for our company. Societe Generale is committed to recognizing and promoting all talents, regardless of their beliefs, age, disability, parental status, ethnic origin, nationality, gender identity, sexual orientation, membership of a political, religious, trade union or minority organisation, or any other characteristic that could be subject to discrimination.

Share

job_data.title: Multlingual Private Equity Analyst
job_data.descriptionHtml:
Overview:


A leading European private equity investment firm with a strong mid-market focus is seeking a driven Analyst to join its Milan-based team. The firm invests across Industrials, Business Services, Consumer, and niche Technology sectors, with a hands-on approach that emphasizes partnership with management teams to deliver sustainable growth and value creation.

This role offers early exposure to cross-border transactions and collaboration with investment professionals across multiple European offices. It’s an exceptional opportunity for a motivated individual to develop core private equity skills within an international environment.


Key Responsibilities


  • Conduct market, financial, and strategic research to support investment opportunities across Europe
  • Build and maintain financial models and valuation analyses under the guidance of senior team members
  • Assist in due diligence processes and preparation of investment materials
  • Support portfolio performance tracking and contribute to internal reporting
  • Participate in cross-European projects and strategic initiatives for portfolio companies


Profile


  • 1–1.5 years of experience in investment banking, consulting, or transaction services, ideally in an international setting
  • Strong analytical and quantitative skills with a proactive, detail-oriented mindset
  • Exposure to cross-European transactions or multinational projects is highly valued
  • Fluent in English and at least one additional European language (German, French, or Spanish preferred)
  • Excellent communication and teamwork skills, with the ambition to grow in a dynamic, entrepreneurial environment


What’s on Offer


  • Role within a distinguished European private equity platform
  • Early, hands-on involvement in live transactions and international investments
  • Continuous learning and development alongside experienced professionals
  • Competitive compensation aligned with top-tier industry standards

job_data.title: Staff Data Analyst - AI Tooling
job_data.descriptionHtml:
Our mission and customers: We are creating the freedom for SMEs to succeed by delivering Europe's leading finance workspace with banking at its core, augmented by financial tools. We are proud to be rated 4.8 on Trustpilot, based on 55,000+ reviews. Our culture puts customer satisfaction at the core of what we do, as proven by our Net Promoter Score of 75.

Our journey: Founded in 2017 by Alexandre and Steve, Qonto has grown to 1,600+ Qontoers serving over 600,000+ customers across 8 European countries. We have been profitable since 2023, and we are just getting started.

Our beliefs: We hire for skills and potential. With 80+ nationalities, 45% women, of which 56% of women in our leadership team, diversity isn't a program; It's who we are. We've built a discrimination-free hiring process because the best teams are built on merit.

AI at Qonto: AI is deeply embedded in how we work (here) - Every Qontoer gets unlimited access to the best AI tools. We want people who experiment without waiting for permission, push AI beyond the obvious, know when to trust it, and when to question it.

⭐ Mission

Step up our Business Analytics team's capabilities on tooling and AI usage by leading by example, assessing the best tools, and shipping innovative solutions. You will redefine how our Business Analytics team consumes and uses data in the AI era, reporting directly to Erwan Croguennoc, who will support you in making a lasting impact on our analytics autonomy and efficiency.

Open to full remote.

👩‍💻🧑‍💻 As a Staff Data Analyst - AI Tooling at Qonto, you will

  • Drive the assessment, POC, and decision-making for our BI tooling stack (e.g., evaluating and migrating from Tableau/Metabase to Omni).
  • Build and ship new ways to expose data to stakeholders, combining traditional dashboards with AI assistants and bots to increase autonomy.
  • Improve high-level Marketing Performance and Growth reporting to ensure alignment and actionable decision-making across leadership.
  • Reduce the analytics backlog by enabling stakeholder self-serve exploration, shortening the time-to-answer from weeks to days.
  • Act as a technical relay and project manager, aligning stakeholders, driving adoption, and influencing ways of working across the broader Data team.

🤔 What you can expect

  • Market/Team Context:You will join a fast-paced environment at the forefront of the AI and tooling transformation, enjoying high exposure and the autonomy to become a guiding expert for the team.
  • Methodologies, how we work, and what we value: We value pragmatism, execution, and leading by example. We expect you to assess, run POCs, align stakeholders, and drive actual adoption rather than just making recommendations.
  • Examples of successful projects we recently worked on: Driving the Omni assessment and leading the BI tooling migration, while simultaneously building a shared, high-level view on Marketing Performance for the Growth leadership.
  • Tools we use: Snowflake, Tableau, Metabase, Omni, Claude, and various AI/ML enablement tools.

🤝 About your future manager: Your Future Manager will be Erwan, Director of Business Analytics.

His background? Erwan has built a strong career at the intersection of data, analytics, and business performance, leading analytics teams and partnering closely with Marketing, Sales, and Finance stakeholders to drive decision-making and measurable impact.

What does he bring to the team? Erwan sets a high bar while staying very pragmatic: he cares about clarity, strong execution, and building a shared, trusted view of performance across teams. He’s also a supportive leader who encourages ownership and autonomy, helps unblock complex stakeholder situations, and invests in developing people so the team can consistently deliver high-quality insights that move the needle.

🏅 About You

  • Data & BI Architecture Mastery: You have strong fundamentals in data analytics, root-cause analysis, and dashboarding. You understand the implications of semantic layers and can anticipate migration risks.
  • Applied AI Fluency: You go beyond basic prompting; you have concrete experience building, shipping, and validating AI-enabled solutions and exposing outcomes directly to stakeholders.
  • Project Management & Execution: You excel in ambiguous environments. You have a track record of setting clear roadmaps, running POCs, and driving adoption for tooling changes.
  • Structured Communication: You are capable of translating complex Growth and Marketing problems into actionable data solutions and delivering executive-ready storytelling.
  • Autonomy & Influence: You are highly self-driven and comfortable challenging the status quo. You can build adoption strategies and act as a relay network with other Staff members.

At Qonto we understand that true diversity isn't just about ticking boxes on a hiring checklist. Apply regardless of the boxes you tick! Who knows? You may have the missing piece of the puzzle we've been searching for all along.

On average, our hiring process lasts 20 working days. More information on our candidate journey here

🔒 Your security matters to us

Recruitment scams are on the rise. Keep in mind, we will never work with third-party platforms or agencies that request payment from candidates.

If you receive a suspicious message claiming to be from Qonto, please report it right away (support@qonto.com)

job_data.title: Cost Analyst & Data Specialist Intern
job_data.descriptionHtml:
Ali Professional, per azienda multinazionale leader nel settore dell'arredamento, ricerca una figura di Cost Controller & Data Specialist da inserire in stage all'interno del Dipartimento Amministrativo.


La risorsa sarà affiancata e formata su queste attività:


  • Attività di monitoraggio e aggiornamento dei costi standard e consuntivi di produzione;
  • Creazione e manutenzione delle anagrafiche prodotto all'interno del sistema gestionale;
  • Collaborazione nella verifica e nell'aggiornamento dei cicli di produzione per assicurarne la coerenza con i processi aziendali;
  • Assistenza nel controllo e nella revisione delle distinte base, garantendo l'accuratezza dei dati tecnici;
  • Partecipazione alle attività di governance del dato, contribuendo a garantirne la qualità e l'integrità all'interno del database aziendale.


Requisiti:


  • Laurea in Ingegneria Gestionale, Economia o percorsi tecnici equivalenti;
  • Buona capacità di lettura e interpretazione di dati numerici.
  • Conoscenza avanzata del pacchetto Office, in particolare di Excel (formule, tabelle pivot).
  • Interesse per il mondo della produzione, dei cicli di lavoro e della struttura del prodotto.
  • Precisione e proattività.
  • Attitudine al Problem Solving
  • Gestione efficace dei compiti assegnati nel rispetto delle scadenze previste per la chiusura dei
  • costi.
  • Buona conoscenza della lingua inglese, scritta e parlata.


Sede di lavoro: Giussano.


Tipologia contrattuale: stage.


Orario di lavoro: 8:30 - 17:30 con un'ora di pausa pranzo.

job_data.title: Technical Data Analyst - Data Platform & Analytics
job_data.descriptionHtml:
About the job

Our Data Analytics team delivers highly intuitive data solutions that inform business decisions across Sales, Marketing, Finance and Operations. We are hiring a Technical Data Analyst who are passionate about transforming structured, high-quality data and be the point of connection between the business and the technical teams, with responsibility for translating business needs into clear and complete functional requirements. They support the design and implementation of data-driven solutions (KPIs, dashboards, quality controls), ensuring alignment with business objectives and compliance with governance standards. We also analyse terabytes of data using tools such as Tableau, SQL and the GCP product suite.



What you’ll do

  • Requirements analysis and gathering: understand business needs and formalize the project scope; identify KPIs, quality rules and expected deliverables; produce functional documentation (e.g. Confluence, Atlan).
  • Functional design: define requirements for interactive dashboards; collaborate on the definition of data models and architectural flows with Data Architects/Engineers.
  • Implementation Support: support the preparation of data sources and KPIs; create dashboards (Tableau) and manage their publication.
  • Quality & Compliance: identify Critical Data Elements (CDEs) and Business Rules for quality control; validate the correct implementation of business rules and KPIs.



Who you are

You are knowledgeable and passionate about data analysis and visualization. You work confidently with tools such as SQL and Tableau, and you are comfortable transforming complex business needs into clear analytical requirements and insightful dashboards. Even if you don’t come from our specific industry, bringing experience and perspectives from other domains is highly valued. You care deeply about data quality, agile ways of working, and responsible experimentation, and you strongly advocate for best practices in analytics—such as iterative development, reproducibility, and continuous improvement of data products.



Must have

  • BSc in STEM disciplines or equivalent working experience
  • At least 3 years of experience, sitting at the intersection of business intelligence and data team
  • You understand what it means exploring complex data structures
  • Fluent in Italian and English



Nice to have

  • Strong analytical skills and love to visualize your data findings in a clear and easy way to understand and to collect corner cases of implementations



Sky promotes the inclusion of every form of talent. All applications will be considered with a view to equal opportunities and inclusion, without discrimination of any kind, including for protected categories pursuant to Law 68/99

https://it.linkedin.com/jobs/view/techni.reasoning: Nonostante l'eccellente percorso accademico e le solide competenze tecniche in Python e Power BI, il candidato non soddisfa il requisito fondamentale di almeno 3 anni di esperienza professionale nel settore BI/Data. Il suo profilo è inoltre fortemente orientato alla finanza quantitativa, divergendo parzialmente dal focus più generalista della Data Platform di Sky.

job_data.title: Data Analyst - Italian & English speaker
job_data.descriptionHtml:
Job Description

Join our team and start a new adventure in an international and dynamic environment, where you will be able to fulfil your career expectations in a fast-growing organization.

Being a consultant at Amaris Consulting means positioning yourself as a technical and functional expert in an industrial field, but above all, being an ambassador of our organization to clients, thanks to:


  • Your interpersonal skills and ability to listen, in order to build a strong relationship of trust with our clients and fully understand their challenges and issues.
  • Your curiosity and eagerness to learn, as we support over 1,000 clients from all sectors worldwide.


Your missions


  • Lead the integration of data from multiple sources into unified systems
  • Design, implement, and optimize data flows to ensure accuracy and reliability
  • Analyze large and complex datasets to identify trends and actionable insights
  • Develop and maintain automated solutions for data integration and reporting
  • Collaborate with business and technical teams to gather requirements and deliver robust data solutions
  • Ensure data quality and integrity throughout all processes
  • Provide technical support and training on data integration tools and best practices
  • Contribute to the continuous improvement of data management methodologies


Your profile


  • Experience in data analysis, data integration, and data flow management (minimum 5 years)
  • Proficiency with SQL and experience in ETL tools and data integration platforms
  • Strong knowledge of data modeling, data warehousing, and database management systems
  • Advanced skills in Python or R for data processing and automation
  • Experience with business intelligence tools (e.g., Power BI)
  • Academic background: Computer Science, Mathematics, Statistics, Information Technology, or related field
  • English and Italian fluent
  • You demonstrate strong analytical and problem-solving skills
  • You demonstrate excellent communication and interpersonal skills
  • You demonstrate the ability to work independently and collaboratively in a multicultural environment
  • You demonstrate attention to detail and a commitment to data quality


What we offer


  • An international community, bringing together 110+ different nationalities
  • An environment where trust has a central place: 70% of our key leaders started their careers at the first level of responsibilities
  • A robust training system with our internal Academy and 250+ available modules
  • A vibrant workplace that frequently gathers for internal events (afterworks, team buildings, etc.)
  • At Mantu, sustainability is part of everything we do. You’ll have the opportunity to turn your ideas into action and make a tangible impact. Every day, our teams bring our ESG commitments to life, from reducing our footprint to driving positive change within our communities. Through our WeCare Together program, you’ll be empowered to design and lead projects that create real social or environmental impact, with the company’s full support.
  • Remote policy: Hybrid work with presence in Milan office required once a week
  • Benefits: Local benefits package according to Milan office policy


Amaris Consulting is proud to be an equal-opportunity workplace. We are committed to promoting diversity within the workforce and creating an inclusive working environment. For this purpose, we welcome applications from all qualified candidates regardless of gender, sexual orientation, race, ethnicity, beliefs, age, marital status, disability, or other characteristics

Who are we?

Amaris Consulting is an independent technology consulting firm providing guidance and solutions to businesses. With more than 1,000 clients across the globe, we have been rolling out solutions in major projects for over a decade – this is made possible by an international team of 7,600 people spread across 5 continents and more than 60 countries. Our solutions focus on four different Business Lines: Information System & Digital, Telecom, Life Sciences and Engineering. We’re focused on building and nurturing a top talent community where all our team members can achieve their full potential. Amaris is your steppingstone to cross rivers of change, meet challenges and achieve all your projects with success.

At Amaris, we strive to provide our candidates with the best possible recruitment experience. We like to get to know our candidates, challenge them, and be able to give them proper feedback as quickly as possible. Here's what our recruitment process looks like:

Brief Call: Our process typically begins with a brief virtual/phone conversation to get to know you! The objective? Learn about you, understand your motivations, and make sure we have the right job for you!

Interviews (the average number of interviews is 3 - the number may vary depending on the level of seniority required for the position). During the interviews, you will meet people from our team: your line manager of course, but also other people related to your future role. We will talk in depth about you, your experience, and skills, but also about the position and what will be expected of you. Of course, you will also get to know Amaris: our culture, our roots, our teams, and your career opportunities!

Case study: Depending on the position, we may ask you to take a test. This could be a role play, a technical assessment, a problem-solving scenario, etc.

As you know, every person is different and so is every role in a company. That is why we have to adapt accordingly, and the process may differ slightly at times. However, please know that we always put ourselves in the candidate's shoes to ensure they have the best possible experience.

We look forward to meeting you!

https://it.linkedin.com/jobs/view/data-a.reasoning: Il candidato è un profilo junior/entry-level, mentre la posizione richiede esplicitamente almeno 5 anni di esperienza e competenze SQL/ETL non approfondite nel CV. Inoltre, Matteo dichiara di non essere interessato al settore della consulenza, che è l'attività principale di Amaris.

job_data.title: Junior Data Analyst
job_data.descriptionHtml:
Nell’ambito della funzione Supporto Nucleo di Valutazione siamo alla ricerca di una risorsa che possa supportare il team e gestire le attività legate ai questionari di valutazione, al fine di garantire la puntuale ed efficace somministrazione, elaborazione e diffusione delle indagini di Ateneo.


Principali attività

  • garantire la predisposizione, somministrazione, elaborazione di indagini statistiche per raccolte di dati di natura qualitativa e/o quantitativa;
  • curare la condivisione e presentazione di survey a diversi stakeholders;
  • fornire supporto al team per tutte le attività amministrative correlate.


Requisiti richiesti

  • Diploma di Laurea in discipline statistiche e/o con competenze in ambito statistico ed informatico;
  • ottima conoscenza del Pacchetto Office, con particolare riferimento a Microsoft Access;
  • adeguata conoscenza di database relazionali (piattaforma SQL server);
  • buona conoscenza del programma PowerBI;
  • buona conoscenza della lingua inglese;
  • buona capacità relazionale;
  • predisposizione al lavoro di squadra.

Rappresenta titolo preferenziale una breve esperienza in un ruolo affine al profilo ricercato.


Sede di lavoro: Milano


Offerta: l’offerta verrà commisurata al livello di esperienza della risorsa selezionata.

https://it.linkedin.com/jobs/view/junior.reasoning: Sebbene il candidato possieda eccellenti doti analitiche e conosca Power BI, il ruolo è focalizzato su indagini statistiche accademiche e supporto amministrativo, ambiti distanti dai suoi obiettivi in Finance e AI. Inoltre, mancano competenze specifiche su MS Access e SQL Server richieste dall'offerta.

job_data.title: REGIONE LOMBARDIA -  - SELEZIONE CONTRATTO DI APPRENDISTATO - PROFILO C) DATA ANALYST IN AMBITO CULTURALE
job_data.descriptionHtml:
PROFILO C

Data Analyst in ambito Culturale

Numero posti

1

Sede di lavoro

Milano

Titolo di studio


  • LM-18: Informatica
  • LM-31: Ingegneria gestionale
  • LM-40: Matematica
  • LM-56: Scienze dell’economia
  • LM-77: Scienze economico-aziendali
  • LM-82: Scienze statistiche
  • LM- 83: Scienze statistiche attuariali e finanziarie


Direzione assegnazione

Direzione Generale

Cultura

Attività


  • Analisi dei dati prevalentemente economici in ambito culturale e supporto alle strutture della Direzione per la gestione della piattaforma relativa ai bandi regionali (BeS).
  • Supporto alle attività della funzione Bilancio e Sistemi informativi della Direzione e sviluppo di reportistica e dashboard di visualizzazione di dati (Excel e PowerBI di base) in collaborazione con Aria S.p.A.
  • Creazione di report e flussi di dati per il caricamento degli stessi nelle piattaforme di rendicontazione regionali, nazionali ed europee (es. ReGIS, database del Ministero della Cultura ecc.).


Percorso di formazione

Minimo 60 ore/anno, di cui:


  • almeno 20 ore in ambito Pubblica Amministrazione;
  • almeno 20 ore in competenze trasversali (soft skills);
  • almeno 20 ore in materie specifiche della posizione da ricoprire.


Selezione

Prova scritta

+

Colloquio orale

Prova a test e/o a domande aperte su:


  • fondamenti di Data Governance e Normative relative all’utilizzo e gestione dei dati (es. CAD - Codice dell’Amministrazione Digitale, Linee guida AGID, ecc.);
  • analisi e qualità dei dati;
  • utilizzo di strumenti per l’analisi dei dati;
  • Open Data, trasparenza amministrativa e privacy.


In caso di superamento della prova scritta, è previsto un colloquio orale finalizzato all’analisi delle conoscenze base delle tematiche oggetto della prova scritta, all’accertamento della conoscenza base della lingua inglese e alla verifica delle capacità attitudinali-comportamentali.

job_data.title: Business Credit Analyst - Categorie Protette L.68/99
job_data.descriptionHtml:
Per una solida realtà operante nel settore bancario e finanziario, specializzata nella gestione e ottimizzazione del credito, siamo alla ricerca di una figura analitica e metodica da inserire all’interno del team.

La risorsa avrà un ruolo chiave nel miglioramento continuo dei processi creditizi, fungendo da ponte tra esigenze di business, compliance normativa e infrastruttura tecnologica.


Il ruolo

In qualità di Business Credit Analyst, la risorsa contribuirà attivamente all’evoluzione dei processi legati al ciclo di vita del credito, intervenendo sia in fase di analisi sia di implementazione operativa.

Principali responsabilità:

  • Analisi e ottimizzazione dei processi di valutazione, concessione e gestione del credito, con l’obiettivo di ridurre tempi e rischi operativi
  • Configurazione delle piattaforme IT (logiche di processo, parametri, tabelle) per garantire efficienza e conformità normativa
  • Supporto nella revisione e implementazione delle policy interne, assicurandone la fattibilità tecnica
  • Collaborazione con funzioni interne e provider esterni per l’integrazione e il miglioramento dei flussi informativi


Requisiti

  • Laurea in Economia, Ingegneria Gestionale o discipline STEM
  • Esperienza di 1–5 anni in ruoli analoghi (back office bancario, internal audit, consulenza o analisi processi)
  • Ottima conoscenza di SQL e database relazionali
  • Padronanza avanzata di Excel e Power BI
  • Familiarità con modelli dati e logiche di processo
  • Buona conoscenza della lingua inglese

Completano il profilo:

  • Precisione, metodo e forte orientamento all’analisi
  • Capacità di organizzazione e comunicazione proattiva


Plus

  • Interesse per tematiche IT e programmazione
  • Conoscenza del settore bancario e della normativa sul credito


Cosa offre l’azienda

  • Inserimento in un contesto strutturato e in crescita, con forte attenzione all’innovazione e all’efficienza operativa
  • Ruolo con impatto diretto sui processi core aziendali
  • Ambiente che valorizza autonomia, pensiero critico ed equilibrio vita-lavoro
  • Contratto a tempo indeterminato – CCNL Commercio
  • Smart working: 2 giorni a settimana


L’offerta è rivolta a candidati appartenenti alle Categorie Protette (L.68/99).


RAL: 35.000/38.000€


La maggior parte dei nuovi assunti nel ruolo rientra in questo intervallo e ha l’opportunità di aumentare la propria retribuzione nel tempo.

L’inquadramento iniziale all’interno della fascia salariale si basa tuttavia sulle conoscenze, competenze ed esperienze rilevanti per la posizione.

L’azienda è impegnata a supportare i propri collaboratori nel raggiungimento del successo e nella crescita professionale.

La retribuzione base è solo una delle componenti del pacchetto di Total Rewards.

job_data.title: REGIONE LOMBARDIA - SELEZIONE CONTRATTO DI APPRENDISTATO - PROFILO D) SPECIALISTA JUNIOR DATA ANALYST
job_data.descriptionHtml:
PROFILO D

Specialista Junior Data Analyst

Numero posti

3

Sede di lavoro

Milano

Titolo di studio Magistrale


  • LM-17: Fisica
  • LM-18: Informatica
  • LM-32: Ingegneria Informatica
  • LM-40: Matematica
  • LM-44: Modellistica Matematico-Fisica per l’Ingegneria
  • LM-77: Scienze Economico-Aziendali ad indirizzo statistico
  • LM-82: Scienze Statistiche


Direzioni di assegnazione

Direzione Centrale Programmazione e Relazioni Esterne

Direzione Generale Sviluppo economico


  • altre Direzioni regionali


Attività


  • Individuazione, raccolta e gestione di dati provenienti da fonti interne ed esterne qualificate.
  • Capacità di analisi (esame di grandi set di dati per individuare pattern, tendenze e correlazioni; predisposizione di sintesi statistiche, identificazione di tendenze).
  • Creazione ed utilizzo di algoritmi e modelli predittivi basati su machine learning e intelligenza artificiale.
  • Supporto nello sviluppo degli applicativi regionali e nell’individuazione di politiche mirate coerentemente con la normativa vigente.
  • Traduzione delle analisi complesse in report, grafici e dashboard comprensibili per i manager e gli stakeholder.


Percorso di formazione

Minimo 60 ore/anno, di cui:


  • almeno 20 ore in ambito Pubblica Amministrazione;
  • almeno 40 ore in materie specifiche della posizione, anche tramite attività esterne a Regione Lombardia.


Selezione

Prova scritta

+

Colloquio orale

Prova a test e/o a domande finalizzate a verificare la conoscenza di base della statistica, analisi di big data predisposizione di report.

In caso di superamento della prova scritta, è previsto un colloquio orale finalizzato all’analisi delle conoscenze base delle tematiche oggetto della prova scritta, all’accertamento della conoscenza base della lingua inglese e alla verifica delle capacità attitudinali-comportamentali.

job_data.title: Service Operations Control Analyst
job_data.descriptionHtml:
Job Description

We are looking for a motivated and detail-oriented Service Operations Control Analyst to join our Service Business Management team.

In this role, you will transform large-scale operational and financial data (revenue, costs, P&L, SLAs, contract profitability) into clear, actionable insights through advanced dashboards and reporting. Your work will directly support margin analysis, contract evaluation, and strategic decision-making in our B2B printing services business.

Responsibilities

Key Resposibilities:

  • Design and maintain high-impact dashboards (mainly Power BI) focused on P&L, margin and service profitability.
  • Extract, transform and model data from ERP, databases and ITSM systems.
  • Conduct margin, trend and root cause analysis to identify cost drivers and performance gaps.
  • Ensure data integrity and standardization of service and financial KPIs.
  • Provide insights for budgeting cycles and strategic service reviews.
  • Collaborate with Service Delivery, Finance and Technical teams to improve reporting infrastructure and business performance.

Qualifications

  • Strong hands-on experience with Power BI (dashboard development).
  • Solid knowledge of data warehouse modeling (Star/Snowflake schemas).
  • Advanced DAX (and/or MDX) skills.
  • Strong SQL/data querying capabilities.
  • Experience with data analysis and data wrangling techniques.
  • Ability to communicate complex metrics clearly to different stakeholders.
  • Good English proficiency.

Nice To Have

  • Experience with ERP/ITSM platforms (e.g., ServiceNow, Jira Service Management).
  • Python or R for data preparation/visualization.
  • Experience with BigQuery or Snowflake.
  • Interest in resource utilization modeling or operational analytics.

Apply high standards of accuracy

Plan & organise effectively

Communicate effectively

Create insight

Apply business acumen

Respond flexibly

job_data.title: Business Credit Analyst - Categorie Protette L.68/99
job_data.descriptionHtml:
Per una solida realtà operante nel settore bancario e finanziario, specializzata nella gestione e ottimizzazione del credito, siamo alla ricerca di una figura analitica e metodica da inserire all’interno del team.

La risorsa avrà un ruolo chiave nel miglioramento continuo dei processi creditizi, fungendo da ponte tra esigenze di business, compliance normativa e infrastruttura tecnologica.


Il ruolo

In qualità di Business Credit Analyst, la risorsa contribuirà attivamente all’evoluzione dei processi legati al ciclo di vita del credito, intervenendo sia in fase di analisi sia di implementazione operativa.

Principali responsabilità:

  • Analisi e ottimizzazione dei processi di valutazione, concessione e gestione del credito, con l’obiettivo di ridurre tempi e rischi operativi
  • Configurazione delle piattaforme IT (logiche di processo, parametri, tabelle) per garantire efficienza e conformità normativa
  • Supporto nella revisione e implementazione delle policy interne, assicurandone la fattibilità tecnica
  • Collaborazione con funzioni interne e provider esterni per l’integrazione e il miglioramento dei flussi informativi


Requisiti

  • Laurea in Economia, Ingegneria Gestionale o discipline STEM
  • Esperienza di 1–5 anni in ruoli analoghi (back office bancario, internal audit, consulenza o analisi processi)
  • Ottima conoscenza di SQL e database relazionali
  • Padronanza avanzata di Excel e Power BI
  • Familiarità con modelli dati e logiche di processo
  • Buona conoscenza della lingua inglese

Completano il profilo:

  • Precisione, metodo e forte orientamento all’analisi
  • Capacità di organizzazione e comunicazione proattiva


Plus

  • Interesse per tematiche IT e programmazione
  • Conoscenza del settore bancario e della normativa sul credito


Cosa offre l’azienda

  • Inserimento in un contesto strutturato e in crescita, con forte attenzione all’innovazione e all’efficienza operativa
  • Ruolo con impatto diretto sui processi core aziendali
  • Ambiente che valorizza autonomia, pensiero critico ed equilibrio vita-lavoro
  • Contratto a tempo indeterminato – CCNL Commercio
  • Smart working: 2 giorni a settimana


L’offerta è rivolta a candidati appartenenti alle Categorie Protette (L.68/99).


RAL: 35.000/38.000€


La maggior parte dei nuovi assunti nel ruolo rientra in questo intervallo e ha l’opportunità di aumentare la propria retribuzione nel tempo.

L’inquadramento iniziale all’interno della fascia salariale si basa tuttavia sulle conoscenze, competenze ed esperienze rilevanti per la posizione.

L’azienda è impegnata a supportare i propri collaboratori nel raggiungimento del successo e nella crescita professionale.

La retribuzione base è solo una delle componenti del pacchetto di Total Rewards.

job_data.title: Associate - Strategy & Corporate Finance
job_data.descriptionHtml:
Who You'll Work With

Driving lasting impact and building long-term capabilities with our clients is not easy work. You are the kind of person who thrives in a high performance/high reward culture - doing hard things, picking yourself up when you stumble, and having the resilience to try another way forward.

In return for your drive, determination, and curiosity, we'll provide the resources, mentorship, and opportunities you need to become a stronger leader faster than you ever thought possible. Your colleagues—at all levels—will invest deeply in your development, just as much as they invest in delivering exceptional results for clients. Every day, you'll receive apprenticeship, coaching, and exposure that will accelerate your growth in ways you won’t find anywhere else.

When you join us, you will have:

  • Continuous learning: Our learning and apprenticeship culture, backed by structured programs, is all about helping you grow while creating an environment where feedback is clear, actionable, and focused on your development. The real magic happens when you take the input from others to heart and embrace the fast-paced learning experience, owning your journey.
  • A voice that matters: From day one, we value your ideas and contributions. You’ll make a tangible impact by offering innovative ideas and practical solutions, all while upholding our unwavering commitment to ethics and integrity. We not only encourage diverse perspectives, but they are critical in driving us toward the best possible outcomes.
  • Global community: With colleagues across 65+ countries and over 100 different nationalities, our firm’s diversity fuels creativity and helps us come up with the best solutions for our clients. Plus, you’ll have the opportunity to learn from exceptional colleagues with diverse backgrounds and experiences.
  • World-class benefits: On top of a competitive salary (based on your location, experience, and skills), we provide a comprehensive benefits package to enable holistic well-being for you and your family.

Your Impact

You will work in teams of typically 2-3 consultants, playing an active role in all aspects of client engagement.

You will combine traditional management consulting skills with issues and techniques of applied corporate finance, playing an important role in leading-edge knowledge development in areas relevant to corporate finance and strategy. This includes gathering and analyzing information, formulating and testing hypotheses, and developing and communicating recommendations. You’ll also have the opportunity to present results to client management and implement recommendations in collaboration with client team members.

You will receive exceptional training as well as frequent coaching and mentoring from colleagues on your teams. This support includes a partner from your local office or practice assigned to you to help guide your career as well as up to five weeks of formal training in your first two years as an associate. Additionally, you will have a professional development manager who manages staffing to help you choose projects based on your priorities as well as the needs of client service teams.

You will be based in our Milan or Rome office as part of our Corporate Finance practice.

Our Corporate Finance practice works on engagements across industries, advising clients on top-management level issues including corporate strategy and restructuring, mergers and acquisitions, joint ventures and alliances, business due diligence, value-based management, ESG strategy and strategy in IPO situations. We close the gap between corporate finance and strategy to have a significant impact on client business and the top-management agenda.

Your Qualifications and Skills

  • Master's degree required with excellent academic record; MBA or finance-related postgraduate degree is an advantage
  • 4+ years of strategy, corporate finance, M&A or due diligence experience in a consulting firm, investment bank, accounting firm or major corporation; experience in a corporate development or strategic finance is preferred
  • Intellectual curiosity, creative thinking and problem-solving mindset
  • Adaptability and openness to collaborate in a flexible environment
  • Sensitivity on social responsibility and ambition to have a real impact on clients and on our communities
  • Exceptional analytical and quantitative problem-solving skills
  • Strong record of leadership in an academic, professional or extracurricular setting
  • Thoughtful, empathic and comfortable communicator
  • Ability to communicate complex ideas effectively – both verbally and in writing – in English and Italian

job_data.title: Business Credit Analyst
job_data.descriptionHtml:
Guber Banca è una challenger bank innovativa, dinamica e in rapida crescita dove il digitale si fonde con il fattore umano. Nati oltre 30 anni fa come operatore specializzato nel credit management, dal 2018 siamo la prima banca italiana ad aver ricevuto ex novo l’autorizzazione dalla Banca Centrale Europea.

Il nostro approccio al mercato e la nostra capacità di adattarci alle più diverse situazioni, ci ha permesso di crescere e di diventare una banca innovativa, moderna e solida.

Il nostro core business è rappresentato da soluzioni sartoriali per supportare le imprese: dalla gestione di NPL e UTP si sono infatti affiancati nuovi business come, tra gli altri, operazioni finanziarie in special situation, acquisto di crediti erariali, factoring evoluto, advisory, due diligence e consulenza in ambito real estate.

La nostra vera forza risiede in un team composto da persone che, tra le sedi di Milano e Brescia, lavora insieme per costruire il futuro con grande entusiasmo e professionalità: «Guber Banca: digital but human first».

Passione, innovazione, Flessibilità e Rispetto sono valori che rispecchiano il nostro modo di intendere il lavoro. Se ti piacciono le sfide, sei nel posto giusto!

Posizione

Siamo alla ricerca di una persona analitica e metodica da inserire nel nostro team per ottimizzare l'intero ciclo di vita del credito, agendo come ponte tra le esigenze di business, la normativa e l’infrastruttura tecnologica.

Il tuo ruolo

In qualità di Business Credit Analyst, sarai il motore del miglioramento continuo dei nostri processi creditizi. Non ti limiterai all'analisi teorica, ma avrai un ruolo attivo nella configurazione delle piattaforme IT per tradurre le strategie della Banca in flussi operativi efficienti.

Le Attività Principali

  • Mappatura e Ottimizzazione: Analizzare i processi di valutazione, concessione e gestione del credito per ridurre tempi di lavorazione e rischi operativi;
  • Configurazione IT: Impostare logiche di processo, parametri e tabelle sulle piattaforme bancarie per garantire agilità e conformità normativa;
  • Allineamento Normativo: Supporto nella revisione delle policy interne per assicurarne la fattibilità tecnica e l’integrazione nei sistemi informatici;
  • Data Integration: Collaborare con uffici interni e provider esterni per ottimizzare il flusso di dati e l’integrazione delle piattaforme.

Requisiti

La persona che cerchiamo possiede:

  • Formazione: Laurea in Ingegneria Gestionale, Economia o altre facoltà STEM.
  • Esperienza: Da 1 a 5 anni in ruoli analoghi (Back office bancario, Internal Audit, Consulenza o analisi di processi organizzativi).
  • Competenze Tecniche:
  • Ottima conoscenza del linguaggio SQL e dei database relazionali.
  • Padronanza avanzata di Excel e PowerBI.
  • Familiarità con i modelli di dati.
  • Estremamente precisa, con un approccio metodico, organizzato, strutturato e capacità di comunicare le proprie idee in modo proattivo.
  • Buona conoscenza della lingua inglese.

Cosa consideriamo un "Plus"

  • Interesse per l'informatica e la programmazione.
  • Conoscenza pregressa del settore bancario e della normativa sui crediti.

Perché scegliere questa opportunità?

Entrerai in un contesto che valorizza l'autonomia e il pensiero critico. Avrai la possibilità di contribuire direttamente sull'efficienza operativa della Banca, lavorando in un ambiente che supporta l'equilibrio vita-lavoro.

CCNL Commercio, contratto a tempo indeterminato e 2 gg di smart working a settimana.

Altre Informazioni

Siamo convinti che la manifestazione dell’individualità e creatività sia un acceleratore dell’innovazione e, pertanto, un fattore decisivo per la crescita e la sostenibilità del Banca.

Guber Banca opera per favorire un’ampia diffusione della cultura necessaria a garantire, all’interno della propria organizzazione, un ambiente inclusivo che non discrimini per genere, età, diversa abilità, stato di salute, etnia, provenienza geografica, orientamento e identità sessuale o ideologie politiche e promuove questi valori per tutelare la massima espressione del potenziale del singolo quale elemento distintivo e funzionale alla crescita del Banca.

job_data.title: Remote Business Analyst (German) - 54879
job_data.descriptionHtml:
About Turing:

Turing is one of the world’s fastest-growing AI companies accelerating the advancement and deployment of powerful AI systems.

Turing helps customers in two ways: Working with the world’s leading AI labs to advance frontier model capabilities in thinking, reasoning, coding, agentic behavior, multimodality, multilinguality, STEM and frontier knowledge; and leveraging that work to build real-world AI systems that solve mission-critical priorities for companies.


Role Overview:

We are looking for candidates with strong analytical and English comprehension skills. The ideal candidate should have the ability to read, summarize, and break down large content into smaller logical blocks, conduct research online, validate claims made in the content through online research, and work with the LLM (Large Language Models) to solve puzzles!

Your role is critical in helping fine-tune and improve large language models (like gpt), and will make you an expert on how to leverage AI to be a better analyst. This is your chance to future-proof your career in an AI-first world!


What does day-to-day look like:

You would spend time answering a variety of interesting analytical questions and creating scenarios that can train the LLM models to get better. Here are a couple of examples which models might get wrong and you would have to give the correct answer and explanation to enable the models to learn:

  • Based on a given distribution of sales by month across locations, could you analyze which location has grown the most? (Hint: what time period should we look at? should we account for sudden variability at the beginning?)
  • In a small town, there are four distinct neighborhoods: Oak, Pine, Maple, and Elm. A postman is assigned to deliver mail and can only deliver to two neighborhoods in one day, with certain rules (e.g. Oak is always visited before Pine). If he delivers to Oak and Elm on the first day, which neighborhoods does the carrier deliver to on the second day? Note: No other prior specialized domain experience is needed.


Requirements:

  • Multilingual capabilities are mandatory. (English and German)
  • Analytical Skills: Good research and analytical skills
  • Feedback Skills: Ability to provide constructive feedback and detailed annotations.
  • Creative Thinking: Creative and lateral thinking abilities.
  • Communication: Excellent communication and collaboration skills.
  • Independence: Self-motivated and able to work independently in a remote setting.
  • Commitment: Ability to commit to 40 hours per week for the contract duration overlapping US hours.
  • Technical Setup: Desktop/Laptop set up with a good internet connection.


Preferred Qualifications:

  • Bachelors degree or undergraduate in Engineering, Literature, Journalism, Communications, Arts, Statistics, or a related field. We are open to candidates who do not have a Bachelor's degree but have experience in the area.
  • Experience writing professionally (business analysts, research analyst, copywriter, journalist, technical writer, editor, translator, etc.)
  • Understanding of Excel and Google Suite.
  • Proficiency in Data interpretation, Logical reasoning and Basic arithmetic is highly desirable.


Perks of Freelancing With Turing:

  • Work in a fully remote environment.
  • Opportunity to work on cutting-edge AI projects with leading LLM companies.
  • Potential for contract extension based on performance and project needs.


Offer Details:

  • Engagement type : Contractor assignment/freelancer (no medical/paid leave)
  • Commitments Required : Availability of up to 40 hours/week is preferred. This role will require some overlap with UTC-8:00 (2-5 hrs/day) America/Los_Angeles


Know amazing talent? Refer them at turing.com/referrals, and earn money from your network.

job_data.title: Marketing Strategy Analyst, B2B Content (Bangkok Based, relocation provided)
job_data.descriptionHtml:
About Agoda

At Agoda, we bridge the world through travel. Our story began in 2005, when two lifelong friends and entrepreneurs, driven by their passion for travel, launched Agoda to make it easier for everyone to explore the world.

Today, we are part of Booking Holdings [NASDAQ: BKNG], with a diverse team of over 7,000 people from 90 countries, working together in offices around the globe. Every day, we connect people to destinations and experiences, with our great deals across our millions of hotels and holiday properties, flights, and experiences worldwide.

No two days are the same at Agoda. Data and technology are at the heart of our culture, fueling our curiosity and innovation. If you’re ready to begin your best journey and help build travel for the world, join us.

This role is based in Bangkok, Thailand, and is open to candidates worldwide. We offer a generous relocation package to ensure a smooth transition to living and working in Bangkok.

The Opportunity 

The B2B Marketing team at Agoda is seeking a Marketing Strategy Analyst (B2B Content Strategy) to work on our content strategy efforts. The ideal candidate will play a pivotal role in defining and executing our product marketing strategy, ensuring that our products resonate with our target audience and achieve market success. You will work on various initiatives to enhance our brand visibility and create compelling narratives that resonate with our B2B partners and prospective partners which drive significant impact to the organization.

Role Overview 

As the Marketing Strategy Analyst (B2B Content Strategy), you will work on the development and execution of various communication strategies aimed at B2B partners. This role includes contributing to Agoda’s comprehensive product marketing strategies, working on our core product value propositions, optimizing all content efforts and measurement tracking, crafting materials for C-suite presentations, and collaborating with stakeholders across departments to identify and showcase our strengths in the B2B travel sector.

Key Responsibilities  

  • Develop and Implement Product Marketing Strategy: working on comprehensive strategies and materials that engage B2B audiences, elevate brand awareness, and deliver tangible business results across multiple business units.
  • Craft Compelling Product Messaging: Develop messaging and positioning that differentiates our products in the market.
  • Project Management of Cross-Functional Initiatives: Ensure alignment and effective communication among all stakeholders while managing cross-functional projects.
  • Performance Analysis: Analyze product and channel performance metrics to refine marketing strategies and enhance product offerings.
  • Enhance Sales Materials and Strategy: Design and execute go-to-market plans for product launches, including promotional campaigns, sales enablement, and training.
  • Conduct Market Research: Identify partner needs and market trends to develop a competitive positioning strategy.
  • Craft Engaging Presentations: Design and manage high-impact presentations that effectively convey Agoda’s brand story and core strategies to partners and C-suite executives.

What You’ll Need to Succeed  

  • Extensive Experience: A minimum of 2 years in product marketing, strategy, content marketing, or related roles—preferably in the tech industry. Experience in a B2B marketing environment is a plus.
  • Data-Driven Approach: Strong analytical skills with the ability to analyze data (SQL knowledge is a strong plus), translate data into actionable insights, and support content strategies and value propositions.
  • Innovative Problem-Solving Skills: The ability to tackle complex challenges in a non-linear fashion is essential. We seek a resourceful candidate who can effectively navigate the organization to gather necessary information and implement innovative solutions while adapting to evolving scenarios and leveraging valuable resources creatively.
  • Strong Communication Skills: Exceptional writing and verbal communication abilities, with proficiency in creating impactful and visually appealing presentations.
  • Strategic Mindset: Proven experience in developing content that aligns with business objectives and enhances brand narrative.
  • Industry and Product Knowledge: Familiarity with the tech and travel industries, with experience in the online travel agency sector being a plus.
  • Technical Proficiency: Knowledge of marketing automation tools, CRM systems, and analytics software is an advantage.

Why Join Us? 

At Agoda, you will play a pivotal role in shaping our communication strategies and driving growth within the B2B marketing division. If you are an innovative thinker passionate about travel technology and have the skills to elevate our brand narrative, we invite you to apply and be part of our dynamic team!

Equal Opportunity Employer

At Agoda, we pride ourselves on being a company represented by people of all different backgrounds and orientations. We prioritize attracting diverse talent and cultivating an inclusive environment that encourages collaboration and innovation. Employment at Agoda is based solely on a person’s merit and qualifications. We are committed to providing equal employment opportunity regardless of sex, age, race, color, national origin, religion, marital status, pregnancy, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability, citizenship, veteran or military status, and other legally protected characteristics.

We will keep your application on file so that we can consider you for future vacancies and you can always ask to have your details removed from the file. For more details please read our privacy policy.

Disclaimer

We do not accept any terms or conditions, nor do we recognize any agency’s representation of a candidate, from unsolicited third-party or agency submissions. If we receive unsolicited or speculative CVs, we reserve the right to contact and hire the candidate directly without any obligation to pay a recruitment fee.

job_data.title: Remote Business Analyst (Italian) - 54881
job_data.descriptionHtml:
About Turing:

Turing is one of the world’s fastest-growing AI companies accelerating the advancement and deployment of powerful AI systems.

Turing helps customers in two ways: Working with the world’s leading AI labs to advance frontier model capabilities in thinking, reasoning, coding, agentic behavior, multimodality, multilinguality, STEM and frontier knowledge; and leveraging that work to build real-world AI systems that solve mission-critical priorities for companies.


Role Overview:

We are looking for candidates with strong analytical and English comprehension skills. The ideal candidate should have the ability to read, summarize, and break down large content into smaller logical blocks, conduct research online, validate claims made in the content through online research, and work with the LLM (Large Language Models) to solve puzzles!

Your role is critical in helping fine-tune and improve large language models (like gpt), and will make you an expert on how to leverage AI to be a better analyst. This is your chance to future-proof your career in an AI-first world!


What does day-to-day look like:

You would spend time answering a variety of interesting analytical questions and creating scenarios that can train the LLM models to get better. Here are a couple of examples which models might get wrong and you would have to give the correct answer and explanation to enable the models to learn:

  • Based on a given distribution of sales by month across locations, could you analyze which location has grown the most? (Hint: what time period should we look at? should we account for sudden variability at the beginning?)
  • In a small town, there are four distinct neighborhoods: Oak, Pine, Maple, and Elm. A postman is assigned to deliver mail and can only deliver to two neighborhoods in one day, with certain rules (e.g. Oak is always visited before Pine). If he delivers to Oak and Elm on the first day, which neighborhoods does the carrier deliver to on the second day? Note: No other prior specialized domain experience is needed.


Requirements:

  • Multilingual capabilities are mandatory. (English and Italian)
  • Analytical Skills: Good research and analytical skills
  • Feedback Skills: Ability to provide constructive feedback and detailed annotations.
  • Creative Thinking: Creative and lateral thinking abilities.
  • Communication: Excellent communication and collaboration skills.
  • Independence: Self-motivated and able to work independently in a remote setting.
  • Commitment: Ability to commit to 40 hours per week for the contract duration overlapping US hours.
  • Technical Setup: Desktop/Laptop set up with a good internet connection.


Preferred Qualifications:

  • Bachelors degree or undergraduate in Engineering, Literature, Journalism, Communications, Arts, Statistics, or a related field. We are open to candidates who do not have a Bachelor's degree but have experience in the area.
  • Experience writing professionally (business analysts, research analyst, copywriter, journalist, technical writer, editor, translator, etc.)
  • Understanding of Excel and Google Suite.
  • Proficiency in Data interpretation, Logical reasoning and Basic arithmetic is highly desirable.


Perks of Freelancing With Turing:

  • Work in a fully remote environment.
  • Opportunity to work on cutting-edge AI projects with leading LLM companies.
  • Potential for contract extension based on performance and project needs.


Offer Details:

  • Engagement type : Contractor assignment/freelancer (no medical/paid leave)
  • Commitments Required : Availability of up to 40 hours/week is preferred. This role will require some overlap with UTC-8:00 (2-5 hrs/day) America/Los_Angeles


Know amazing talent? Refer them at turing.com/referrals, and earn money from your network.

job_data.title: Strategy Analyst (Bangkok Based, Relocation Provided)
job_data.descriptionHtml:
About Agoda

At Agoda, we bridge the world through travel. Our story began in 2005, when two lifelong friends and entrepreneurs, driven by their passion for travel, launched Agoda to make it easier for everyone to explore the world.

Today, we are part of Booking Holdings [NASDAQ: BKNG], with a diverse team of over 7,000 people from 90 countries, working together in offices around the globe. Every day, we connect people to destinations and experiences, with our great deals across our millions of hotels and holiday properties, flights, and experiences worldwide.

No two days are the same at Agoda. Data and technology are at the heart of our culture, fueling our curiosity and innovation. If you’re ready to begin your best journey and help build travel for the world, join us.

Get To Know The Team:

The Performance Marketing Team of Agoda is a world leader in online marketing. This department is highly data-driven and focused on developing at-scale marketing programs that improve the lifetime value of Agoda customers through measurable marketing programs and channels. The team is a blend of the best analysts, marketing strategists, and data scientists in the world. The marketing leadership at Agoda has deep experience in data science, product, strategy, and other marketing fields and has built an organization that thrives on data, creative ideas, and technology. The Performance Marketing Team also fosters a great learning environment. You will be able to learn and grow by working closely with experts from a variety of backgrounds from all over the world.

Due to continued expansion, there are multiple analyst roles within the marketing team across different marketing channels. While the scope will vary depending on these channels, here are some examples:

  • Experimentation and optimizing campaign performance: Experiment with ads/campaign structures and bidding& pricing strategies on partners such as Google, Bing, TripAdvisor, Trivago, and other search engines. Adapt to new product features and roll out changes from successful tests.
  • Modeling: Analyze vast amounts of data generated by experiments, develop predictive models using data science techniques (e.g. understanding the impact on bookings from large-scale TV campaigns or demand elasticity from pricing optimization), and liaise with product teams on an implementation roadmap
  • Reporting, analysis, and insights: Building dashboards to track performance, derive insights, understand growth levers, and communicate recommendations via presentations to stakeholders

What you’ll Need to Succeed:

  • Bachelor’s degree or higher from top university in a quantitative subject e.g. computer science, mathematics, engineering business, science, or relevant field of study
  • 0 to 4 years experience in data crunching from top-tier consulting, investment banking, private equity or strategy/business role for a fast-growing global tech company
  • Experience in one or more data analysis packages or databases, e.g. SQL, SAS, R, SPSS, Python, VBA and visualization tools, e.g. Tableau, Power BI, etc.
  • Excellent verbal and written communication skills in English
  • Ability to move fast and be efficient, making decisions on objective data evidence
  • Innate desire to take ownership, make an impact and influence outcomes
  • Excellent organizational skills, attention to detail and ability to work independently

It’s Great if you Have:

  • Experience in digital marketing or e-commerce
  • Experience with A/B testing and other testing metrics
  • Strong presentation and negotiation skills

(English and Italian)Analytical Skills: Good research and analytical skillsFeedback Skills: Ability to provide constructive feedback and detailed annotations.Creative Thinking: Creative and lateral thinking abilities.Communication: Excellent communication and collaboration skills.Independence: Self-motivated and able to work independently in a remote setting.Commitment: Ability to commit to 40 hours per week for the contract duration overlapping US hours.Technical Setup: Desktop/Laptop set up with a good internet connection.
Preferred Qualifications:Bachelors degree or undergraduate in Engineering, Literature, Journalism, Communications, Arts, Statistics, or a related field. We are open to candidates who do not have a Bachelor's degree but have experience in the area.Experience writing professionally (business analysts, research analyst, copywriter, journalist, technical writer, editor, translator, etc.)Understanding of Excel and Google Suite.Proficiency in Data interpretation, Logical reasoning and Basic arithmetic is highly desirable.
Perks of Freelancing With Turing:Work in a fully remote environment.Opportunity to work on cutting-edge AI projects with leading LLM companies.Potential for contract extension based on performance and project needs.
Offer Details:Engagement type : Contractor assignment/freelancer (no medical/paid leave)Commitments Required : Availability of up to 40 hours/week is preferred. This role will require some overlap with UTC-8:00 (2-5 hrs/day) America/Los_Angeles
Know amazing talent? Refer them at turing.com/referrals, and earn money from your network.

https://it.linkedin.com/jobs/view/remote.reasoning: Nonostante le eccellenti doti analitiche e l'interesse per l'IA, il ruolo è in netto contrasto con le preferenze del candidato: è una posizione freelance e full-remote (entrambe escluse esplicitamente) e non riguarda il settore Finance o l'ingegneria gestionale.

job_data.title: Business Data Analyst (Bangkok Based, relocation provided)
job_data.descriptionHtml:
About Agoda

At Agoda, we bridge the world through travel. Our story began in 2005, when two lifelong friends and entrepreneurs, driven by their passion for travel, launched Agoda to make it easier for everyone to explore the world.

Today, we are part of Booking Holdings [NASDAQ: BKNG], with a diverse team of over 7,000 people from 90 countries, working together in offices around the globe. Every day, we connect people to destinations and experiences, with our great deals across our millions of hotels and holiday properties, flights, and experiences worldwide.

No two days are the same at Agoda. Data and technology are at the heart of our culture, fueling our curiosity and innovation. If you’re ready to begin your best journey and help build travel for the world, join us.

Get to Know our Team:

The Flights Marketing Team of Agoda is a world leader in online marketing. This department is highly data-driven and focused on developing at-scale marketing programs that improve the lifetime value of Agoda customers through measurable marketing programs and channels. The team is a blend of the best analysts, marketing strategists, and data scientists in the world. The marketing leadership at Agoda have deep experience in data science, product, strategy, and other marketing fields and have built an organization that thrives on data, creative ideas, and technology. The Performance Marketing - Flight Team also fosters a great learning environment. You will be able to learn and grow by working closely with experts from a variety of backgrounds from all over the world.

In this Role, you’ll get to:

  • You'll be heavily involved in growing our Flights business
  • Experiment with various pricing strategies on Agoda and Metasearch to grow the business
  • Analyze massive amounts of data generated in experiments, build dashboards, and develop predictive models
  • Work with diverse stakeholders to arrive at investment plans for markets and channels

What you’ll Need to Succeed:

  • Bachelor’s Degree or higher from top university in a quantitative subject (computer science, mathematics, engineering, statistics or science)
  • Ability to communicate fluently and succinctly in English
  • Good numerical reasoning skills
  • Strong problem solving skills
  • Proficiency in Excel and SQL
  • Intellectual curiosity

It’s Great if you Have:

  • Exposure to one or more data analysis packages or databases, e.g., SAS, R, SPSS, Python, VBA, SQL
  • Experience in digital marketing
