job_data.title: Remote Business Analyst (Italian) - 54881
job_data.descriptionHtml:
About Turing:

Turing is one of the world’s fastest-growing AI companies accelerating the advancement and deployment of powerful AI systems.

Turing helps customers in two ways: Working with the world’s leading AI labs to advance frontier model capabilities in thinking, reasoning, coding, agentic behavior, multimodality, multilinguality, STEM and frontier knowledge; and leveraging that work to build real-world AI systems that solve mission-critical priorities for companies.


Role Overview:

We are looking for candidates with strong analytical and English comprehension skills. The ideal candidate should have the ability to read, summarize, and break down large content into smaller logical blocks, conduct research online, validate claims made in the content through online research, and work with the LLM (Large Language Models) to solve puzzles!

Your role is critical in helping fine-tune and improve large language models (like gpt), and will make you an expert on how to leverage AI to be a better analyst. This is your chance to future-proof your career in an AI-first world!


What does day-to-day look like:

You would spend time answering a variety of interesting analytical questions and creating scenarios that can train the LLM models to get better. Here are a couple of examples which models might get wrong and you would have to give the correct answer and explanation to enable the models to learn:

  • Based on a given distribution of sales by month across locations, could you analyze which location has grown the most? (Hint: what time period should we look at? should we account for sudden variability at the beginning?)
  • In a small town, there are four distinct neighborhoods: Oak, Pine, Maple, and Elm. A postman is assigned to deliver mail and can only deliver to two neighborhoods in one day, with certain rules (e.g. Oak is always visited before Pine). If he delivers to Oak and Elm on the first day, which neighborhoods does the carrier deliver to on the second day? Note: No other prior specialized domain experience is needed.


Requirements:

  • Multilingual capabilities are mandatory. (English and Italian)
  • Analytical Skills: Good research and analytical skills
  • Feedback Skills: Ability to provide constructive feedback and detailed annotations.
  • Creative Thinking: Creative and lateral thinking abilities.
  • Communication: Excellent communication and collaboration skills.
  • Independence: Self-motivated and able to work independently in a remote setting.
  • Commitment: Ability to commit to 40 hours per week for the contract duration overlapping US hours.
  • Technical Setup: Desktop/Laptop set up with a good internet connection.


Preferred Qualifications:

  • Bachelors degree or undergraduate in Engineering, Literature, Journalism, Communications, Arts, Statistics, or a related field. We are open to candidates who do not have a Bachelor's degree but have experience in the area.
  • Experience writing professionally (business analysts, research analyst, copywriter, journalist, technical writer, editor, translator, etc.)
  • Understanding of Excel and Google Suite.
  • Proficiency in Data interpretation, Logical reasoning and Basic arithmetic is highly desirable.


Perks of Freelancing With Turing:

  • Work in a fully remote environment.
  • Opportunity to work on cutting-edge AI projects with leading LLM companies.
  • Potential for contract extension based on performance and project needs.


Offer Details:

  • Engagement type : Contractor assignment/freelancer (no medical/paid leave)
  • Commitments Required : Availability of up to 40 hours/week is preferred. This role will require some overlap with UTC-8:00 (2-5 hrs/day) America/Los_Angeles


Know amazing talent? Refer them at turing.com/referrals, and earn money from your network.

job_data.title: E-Commerce Business Analyst
job_data.descriptionHtml:
Sodalis Group è leader italiano e tra le principali realtà europee indipendenti nel settore Health, Beauty, Personal & Home Care.

Sempre guidati da un’innata passione per quello che facciamo e da un profondo desiderio di costante miglioramento, oggi siamo il leader italiano nel mercato della Cosmetica e della Nutraceutica e rappresentiamo una realtà imprenditoriale multi-brand e multi-canale, dinamica e internazionale, in continua espansione.

Conquistiamo ogni giorno milioni di consumatori grazie al nostro vasto portafoglio di marchi proprietari altamente attrattivi e riconosciuti, con posizioni di forza in farmacia, grande distribuzione, e-commerce e profumeria.

Per il nostro HQ a Lodi Vecchio siamo alla ricerca di una figura di E-Commerce Business Analyst, che supporterà le attività di analisi e monitoraggio delle performance dei canali digitali, contribuendo allo sviluppo delle strategie commerciali e all’ottimizzazione dei processi operativi e di approvvigionamento.

Di Cosa Ti Occuperai

  • Analisi e reportistica periodica delle performance e-commerce (KPI di vendita, conversion rate, traffico, marginalità).
  • Monitoraggio e analisi delle performance dei siti e-commerce aziendali e dei marketplace, con focus sul canale Amazon.
  • Supporto all’E-commerce Manager nella stesura dei budget, nel monitoraggio degli scostamenti e nell’analisi delle performance rispetto agli obiettivi.
  • Supporto alle attività di forecasting della domanda e stima dei fabbisogni di stock per il canale online.
  • Pianificazione e monitoraggio dell’approvvigionamento di materiale promozionale destinato alle attività e-commerce.
  • Analisi dei dati CRM e customer insights a supporto delle strategie commerciali e di marketing.
  • Supporto allo sviluppo di analisi e modelli previsionali utili alla pianificazione commerciale.
  • Ideazione, strutturazione e analisi di survey e ricerche clienti finalizzate a migliorare l’esperienza utente e la conoscenza del consumatore.
  • Collaborazione con i team marketing, sales, supply chain e digital per ottimizzare le performance dei canali online.

Cosa Cerchiamo

  • Laurea in Economia, Management o discipline affini.
  • Almeno 2 anni di esperienza nel ruolo
  • Ottime capacità di analisi dei dati e reporting e di interpretare KPI digitali e tradurre i dati in insight operativi.
  • Ottima conoscenza di Excel e strumenti di analisi dati.
  • Interesse o esperienza nel mondo e-commerce e digital business.
  • Attitudine al problem solving e al lavoro cross-funzionale, buone capacità organizzative e attenzione al dettaglio.

Il presente annuncio è rivolto a candidati di entrambi i sessi, ai sensi delle L. 903/77 e L. 125/91, e a persone di tutte le età e nazionalità, ai sensi dei D.Lgs. 215/03 e 216/03.
job_data.descriptionText:
Sodalis Group è leader italiano e tra le principali realtà europee indipendenti nel settore Health, Beauty, Personal & Home Care.

Sempre guidati da un’innata passione per quello che facciamo e da un profondo desiderio di costante miglioramento, oggi siamo il leader italiano nel mercato della Cosmetica e della Nutraceutica e rappresentiamo una realtà imprenditoriale multi-brand e multi-canale, dinamica e internazionale, in continua espansione.

Conquistiamo ogni giorno milioni di consumatori grazie al nostro vasto portafoglio di marchi proprietari altamente attrattivi e riconosciuti, con posizioni di forza in farmacia, grande distribuzione, e-commerce e profumeria.

Per il nostro HQ a Lodi Vecchio siamo alla ricerca di una figura di E-Commerce Business Analyst, che supporterà le attività di analisi e monitoraggio delle performance dei canali digitali, contribuendo allo sviluppo delle strategie commerciali e all’ottimizzazione dei processi operativi e di approvvigionamento.

Di Cosa Ti Occuperai

Analisi e reportistica periodica delle performance e-commerce (KPI di vendita, conversion rate, traffico, marginalità).Monitoraggio e analisi delle performance dei siti e-commerce aziendali e dei marketplace, con focus sul canale Amazon.Supporto all’E-commerce Manager nella stesura dei budget, nel monitoraggio degli scostamenti e nell’analisi delle performance rispetto agli obiettivi.Supporto alle attività di forecasting della domanda e stima dei fabbisogni di stock per il canale online.Pianificazione e monitoraggio dell’approvvigionamento di materiale promozionale destinato alle attività e-commerce.Analisi dei dati CRM e customer insights a supporto delle strategie commerciali e di marketing.Supporto allo sviluppo di analisi e modelli previsionali utili alla pianificazione commerciale.Ideazione, strutturazione e analisi di survey e ricerche clienti finalizzate a migliorare l’esperienza utente e la conoscenza del consumatore.Collaborazione con i team marketing, sales, supply chain e digital per ottimizzare le performance dei canali online.

Cosa Cerchiamo

Laurea in Economia, Management o discipline affini.Almeno 2 anni di esperienza nel ruoloOttime capacità di analisi dei dati e reporting e di interpretare KPI digitali e tradurre i dati in insight operativi.Ottima conoscenza di Excel e strumenti di analisi dati.Interesse o esperienza nel mondo e-commerce e digital business.Attitudine al problem solving e al lavoro cross-funzionale, buone capacità organizzative e attenzione al dettaglio.

Il presente annuncio è rivolto a candidati di entrambi i sessi, ai sensi delle L. 903/77 e L. 125/91, e a persone di tutte le età e nazionalità, ai sensi dei D.Lgs. 215/03 e 216/03.

job_data.title: Business Analyst (Sales)
job_data.descriptionHtml:
About Mind The Value

Mind The Value is an international consulting company that aims to empower businesses to unlock their full potential and achieve sustainable growth through process optimization, system integration, and technology implementation.

Through our expertise in decision-making, management, and operational excellence, we strive to drive transformative change and create measurable value for our customers. We envision a future where organizations excel by leveraging innovative strategies, optimized processes, and cutting-edge technologies: digital transformation, Industry 5.0, etc....

We are proud to drive innovation by combining business challenges with result-driven technologies.

At Mind The Value, we believe in making a positive difference by creating unique opportunities for unique talents because people are at the center of our strategy.

Join our fast-paced team of dedicated professionals to gain exciting experience in growing, developing, and thriving together.

General information:

  • Industry: Corporate decision making, management and operational consulting
  • Business Area: Sales
  • Years of experience: 1-3 years
  • Degree: Master’s Degree
  • Employment contract: Permanent
  • Headquarter: Milan, Italy


What We Offer

  • People First: Mind The Value prioritizes people and values, their well-being and development.
  • Continuous growth and merit-based career path: Mind The Value provides custom-built training courses for continuous learning in order to ensure personal and professional growth.
  • International Exposure: The collaboration with international clients, projects, and a multi-cultural teams offers an opportunity to gain valuable experience and a wide range of high-level competencies.
  • Excellence: Working in a dynamic environment helps develop analytical skills, innovation and problem-solving approaches.


Role and Responsibilities:

The Business Analyst role will have the opportunity to develop both functional competencies in areas such as supply chain and finance, as well as technical competencies in configuring and implementing best-of-breed solutions like SAP, IBM, Dassault, and Adobe Commerce.

The Business Analyst will be assigned to a dedicated business unit focused on a specific process. This unit collaborates on exciting projects and serves prestigious clients from around the globe. Among the responsibilities are analyzing business processes, identifying areas for improvement, and offering valuable insights and recommendations.

Working on digital transformation and business process re-engineering projects, you will be involved in the following main activities:

  • Process analysis: Collecting and analyzing business requirements to define and implement operating models.
  • Process redesign: Conducting functional analysis and system customization to support project implementation and development. Reviewing system functionalities based on current configuration and/or technical specifications.
  • Process automation: Utilizing disruptive technologies such as drones, interconnected solutions, dashboards, big data, and cloud to automate processes and standardize procedures.
  • Business process optimization: Assisting in the implementation of Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) solutions or other technological platforms, ranging from model and process design to implementation.
  • Creating presentations to effectively communicate with business references OR stakeholders.
  • Conducting training sessions for key users and providing post go-live support.


Qualifications:

Technical and functional skills:

  • Master's degree in one of the following fields: Engineering, Business Administration, or Economics.
  • Strong interest in business processes and technology.
  • Knowledge of SAP SD module and Order to Cash process.
  • Knowledge of SAP S/4 Hana is an asset.
  • Analytical and problem-solving skills.
  • Excellent knowledge of MS Office.
  • Good knowledge of English and Italian.


Soft Skills:

  • Entrepreneurial mindset: contributing effectively to a growing and innovative environment.
  • Collaboration skills.
  • Dynamic, flexible, and proactive approach.
  • Agile mindset for facing challenges and managing multiple deliverables and projects.
  • Analytical and result-oriented mindset, producing high-quality output.
  • Effective communication skills.
  • Ability to reduce complexity and provide simple and measurable solutions.


At Mind the Value, we are proud to be an equal opportunity employer, fostering a diverse and inclusive workplace where all individuals are welcome and valued.

You will be assigned to our Business Unit: Order to Cash.

job_data.title: Remote Business Analyst (Italian) - 54881
job_data.descriptionHtml:
About Turing:

Turing is one of the world’s fastest-growing AI companies accelerating the advancement and deployment of powerful AI systems.

Turing helps customers in two ways: Working with the world’s leading AI labs to advance frontier model capabilities in thinking, reasoning, coding, agentic behavior, multimodality, multilinguality, STEM and frontier knowledge; and leveraging that work to build real-world AI systems that solve mission-critical priorities for companies.


Role Overview:

We are looking for candidates with strong analytical and English comprehension skills. The ideal candidate should have the ability to read, summarize, and break down large content into smaller logical blocks, conduct research online, validate claims made in the content through online research, and work with the LLM (Large Language Models) to solve puzzles!

Your role is critical in helping fine-tune and improve large language models (like gpt), and will make you an expert on how to leverage AI to be a better analyst. This is your chance to future-proof your career in an AI-first world!


What does day-to-day look like:

You would spend time answering a variety of interesting analytical questions and creating scenarios that can train the LLM models to get better. Here are a couple of examples which models might get wrong and you would have to give the correct answer and explanation to enable the models to learn:

  • Based on a given distribution of sales by month across locations, could you analyze which location has grown the most? (Hint: what time period should we look at? should we account for sudden variability at the beginning?)
  • In a small town, there are four distinct neighborhoods: Oak, Pine, Maple, and Elm. A postman is assigned to deliver mail and can only deliver to two neighborhoods in one day, with certain rules (e.g. Oak is always visited before Pine). If he delivers to Oak and Elm on the first day, which neighborhoods does the carrier deliver to on the second day? Note: No other prior specialized domain experience is needed.


Requirements:

  • Multilingual capabilities are mandatory. (English and Italian)
  • Analytical Skills: Good research and analytical skills
  • Feedback Skills: Ability to provide constructive feedback and detailed annotations.
  • Creative Thinking: Creative and lateral thinking abilities.
  • Communication: Excellent communication and collaboration skills.
  • Independence: Self-motivated and able to work independently in a remote setting.
  • Commitment: Ability to commit to 40 hours per week for the contract duration overlapping US hours.
  • Technical Setup: Desktop/Laptop set up with a good internet connection.


Preferred Qualifications:

  • Bachelors degree or undergraduate in Engineering, Literature, Journalism, Communications, Arts, Statistics, or a related field. We are open to candidates who do not have a Bachelor's degree but have experience in the area.
  • Experience writing professionally (business analysts, research analyst, copywriter, journalist, technical writer, editor, translator, etc.)
  • Understanding of Excel and Google Suite.
  • Proficiency in Data interpretation, Logical reasoning and Basic arithmetic is highly desirable.


Perks of Freelancing With Turing:

  • Work in a fully remote environment.
  • Opportunity to work on cutting-edge AI projects with leading LLM companies.
  • Potential for contract extension based on performance and project needs.


Offer Details:

  • Engagement type : Contractor assignment/freelancer (no medical/paid leave)
  • Commitments Required : Availability of up to 40 hours/week is preferred. This role will require some overlap with UTC-8:00 (2-5 hrs/day) America/Los_Angeles


Know amazing talent? Refer them at turing.com/referrals, and earn money from your network.

job_data.title: Digital Experience Business Analyst
job_data.descriptionHtml:
For a leading multinational company in the automotive sector, Experis is seeking a Digital Experience Business Analyst (CRM & Automation).


We are seeking an experienced Digital Experience Business Analyst (CRM & Automation) candidate to define, own, and continuously improve our customer contact strategy across AI‑enabled automation, Salesforce Service Cloud, Agentforce and WhatsApp. This role sits within the Customer Care/Process and Tools function and acts as the business authority for customer service technology. The successful candidate will translate contact centre needs, customer expectations, and operational challenges into clear business requirements, process designs, and knowledge content, working closely with IT, system integrators, and vendors to deploy, enhance, and optimise solutions. The role is accountable for ensuring that technology supports efficient agents, effective self‑service, regulatory compliance, and a consistent customer experience across channels.

This role acts as a key bridge between Customer Care and IT, translating customer experience needs into clear business and functional requirements for digital solutions such as CRM, automation, and AI tools.


Key Responsibilities


  • Gather and translate Customer Care needs into functional requirements for IT
  • Design and improve customer journeys (assisted and self-service)
  • Drive the evolution of digital tools such as:
  • Salesforce Service Cloud
  • AI & automation solutions (chatbots, routing, etc.)
  • Digital channels (e.g. WhatsApp)
  • Define operational rules:
  • case/ticket management
  • routing and automation logic
  • bot-to-agent handover
  • Monitor service KPIs (AHT, FCR, CSAT) and identify improvements
  • Work closely with IT, operations, and vendors on implementation and optimization
  • Manage knowledge base and content for agents and customers
  • Support change management and continuous improvement


Ideal Candidate Profile


  • Experience with CRM systems, ideally Salesforce Service Cloud
  • Strong ability to translate business needs into IT requirements
  • Strong stakeholder management skills (business & IT interface)
  • Knowledge of automation and AI in customer service (chatbots, self-service, digital channels)
  • Experience in customer journey design and process improvement
  • Data-driven mindset and focus on continuous improvement
  • English C1-C2


Location: Arese (MI), full on site.

Offer: Staff leasing Contract, RAL commensurate with experience


NOTE LEGALI: Experis è una compagnia eticamente responsabile. Il servizio è gratuito. I candidati ambosessi (L.903/77 - D.Lgs. n.198/2006) sono invitati a leggere l'informativa Privacy su www.experis.it Aut. Min. Prot. N. 1116 - SG - del 26/11/04.

Il titolare della registrazione e/o candidatura dichiara di essere a conoscenza delle sanzioni penali previste in caso di dichiarazioni mendaci o contenenti dati non più rispondenti a verità come previsto dal D.P.R. nº445 del 28.12.2000

job_data.title: Business Analyst
job_data.descriptionHtml:
Chi siamo

AGAP2 è un gruppo europeo di consulenza ingegneristica e informatica, parte del Gruppo MoOngy, con oltre 10.000 dipendenti e una presenza in 14 Paesi.

In Italia dal 2018, con sedi a Milano, Brescia, Parma, La Spezia e Roma, siamo in forte crescita e ampliamento del nostro team. Cerchiamo persone dinamiche, ambiziose e pronte a mettersi in gioco in un ambiente che valorizza le relazioni umane, la crescita professionale e l’innovazione tecnologica.


Descrizione del Ruolo

Siamo alla ricerca di un Business Analyst da inserire presso una nostra realtà partner operante in ambito finanziario/bancario.

La risorsa sarà coinvolta nelle attività di analisi e gestione dei flussi operativi interni, supportando i team nelle attività di coordinamento, smistamento task e ottimizzazione dei processi attraverso l’utilizzo di applicativi e soluzioni AI di ultima generazione.

La figura lavorerà a stretto contatto con stakeholder business e IT, contribuendo all’efficientamento delle attività operative e alla gestione delle priorità progettuali all’interno di un contesto strutturato e dinamico.


IL TUO RUOLO

La risorsa si occuperà di:

  • Analizzare e monitorare i flussi operativi interni;
  • Supportare la gestione e lo smistamento delle attività tra i vari team;
  • Collaborare con stakeholder business e IT per la raccolta delle esigenze operative;
  • Utilizzare strumenti e applicativi AI per l’ottimizzazione dei processi;
  • Supportare le attività di reporting e monitoraggio operativo;
  • Contribuire al miglioramento continuo dei processi interni;
  • Affiancare il team nella gestione delle priorità e delle attività progettuali.


Requisiti

  • Esperienza di almeno 2 anni in ruoli di Business Analyst, PMO o analisi processi;
  • Buona conoscenza dei principali strumenti AI e degli applicativi attualmente presenti sul mercato;
  • Conoscenza base di Python;
  • Gradita minima esperienza con modelli LLM;
  • Buona capacità di gestione operativa e organizzazione delle attività;
  • Ottime capacità comunicative e relazionali;
  • Conoscenza fluente della lingua italiana;


Cosa Offriamo

  • Contratto a tempo indeterminato
  • Inserimento in un contesto tecnico strutturato e stimolante
  • Opportunità di crescita professionale su attività trasversali
  • Formazione continua e affiancamento operativo
  • Ambiente dinamico, orientato alla collaborazione e allo sviluppo delle competenze


The world needs you

AGAP2 è un equal opportunities employer: crediamo che tutte le forme di diversità siano fonte di arricchimento reciproco. Ci impegniamo a garantire un ambiente di lavoro inclusivo, nel quale ogni singola risorsa possa apportare un valore unico alla nostra realtà. Pertanto, accogliamo candidature senza distinzione di età, genere, nazionalità, disabilità, orientamento sessuale, religione o stato civile.

Inoltre, teniamo fede ai nostri impegni prestando attenzione alle risorse appartenenti alle categorie protette ai sensi degli articoli 1 e 18 della Legge 68/99.

I dati personali saranno trattati in conformità alle disposizioni contenute nel regolamento UE 2016/679.

job_data.industries: IT Services and IT Consulting, IT System Custom Software Development, and IT System Design Services

job_data.title: Business Analyst – Dynamics 365 F&O
job_data.descriptionHtml:
Who are we

Amaris Consulting is an independent technology consulting firm providing guidance and solutions to businesses. With more than 1,000 clients across the globe, we have been rolling out solutions in major projects since 2007 – this is made possible by an international team of 7,600 people spread across 5 continents and more than 60 countries. Our solutions focus on four different Business Lines: Information System & Digital, Telecom, Life Sciences and Engineering. At Amaris, we strive to provide our candidates with the best possible recruitment experience. Here’s what our recruitment process looks like:

Brief Call: Our process typically begins with a brief virtual/phone conversation to get to know you! Learn about you, understand your motivations, and make sure we have the right job for you!

Interviews (the average number of interviews is 3 - the number may vary depending on the level of seniority required for the position). During the interviews, you will meet people from our team: your manager of course, but also other people related to your future role. We will talk in depth about you, your experience, and skills, but also about the position and what will be expected of you. Of course, you will also get to know Amaris Consulting: our culture, our roots, our teams, and your career opportunities!

Case study: Depending on the position, we may ask you to take a test. This could be a role play, a technical assessment, a problem-solving scenario, etc. As every role is different, we adapt the process accordingly, always focusing on the best possible candidate experience. We look forward to meeting you!


Job description

Join our team and start a new adventure in an international and dynamic environment, where you will be able to fulfil your career expectations in a fast-growing organization. Being a consultant at Amaris Consulting means positioning yourself as a technical and functional expert in an industrial field, but above all, being an ambassador of our organization to clients, thanks to:

  • Your interpersonal skills and ability to listen, in order to build a strong relationship of trust with our clients and fully understand their challenges and issues.
  • Your curiosity and eagerness to learn, as we support over 1,000 clients from all sectors worldwide.

Your missions

  • Gather and analyze business requirements from stakeholders
  • Write and maintain functional and technical documentation
  • Manage and configure Dynamics 365 F&O modules according to business needs
  • Coordinate and execute system testing and user acceptance testing
  • Support data migration and integration activities
  • Provide operational support and troubleshooting for Dynamics 365 F&O
  • Train end users and prepare training materials
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure successful project delivery

Your profile

  • Experience as Business Analyst with Dynamics 365 F&O (5–7 years)
  • Experience with configuration and operational management of Dynamics 365 F&O
  • Experience with requirements gathering and process mapping
  • Experience with documentation and reporting tools
  • Academic background: degree in Information Systems, Business Administration, or related field
  • Italian and English fluent
  • You demonstrate strong analytical and problem-solving skills
  • You demonstrate excellent communication and stakeholder management skills
  • You demonstrate the ability to work collaboratively in multicultural and hybrid teams

What we offer

  • An international community bringing together 110+ different nationalities
  • An environment where trust has a central place: 70% of our key leaders started their careers at the first level of responsibilities
  • A robust training system with our internal Academy and 250+ available modules
  • A vibrant workplace that frequently gathers for internal events (afterworks, team buildings, etc.)
  • At Mantu, sustainability is part of everything we do. You’ll have the opportunity to turn your ideas into action and make a tangible impact. Every day, our teams bring our ESG commitments to life, from reducing our footprint to driving positive change within our communities. Through our WeCare Together program, you’ll be empowered to design and lead projects that create real social or environmental impact, with the company’s full support.


Amaris Consulting is proud to be an equal-opportunity workplace. We are committed to promoting diversity within the workforce and creating an inclusive working environment. For this purpose, we welcome applications from all qualified candidates regardless of gender, sexual orientation, race, ethnicity, beliefs, age, marital status, disability, or other characteristics.

Our solutions focus on four different Business Lines: Information System & Digital, Telecom, Life Sciences and Engineering. job_data.title: Business Analyst
job_data.descriptionHtml:
Unes Supermercati, azienda italiana della Grande Distribuzione Organizzata, nasce a Milano nel 1967 e da allora ha saputo cogliere e reagire al meglio alle sfide del settore.

Oggi siamo presenti per un totale di oltre 190 punti vendita, tra diretti e franchising, in Lombardia, Piemonte ed Emilia-Romagna.

La società conta su un organico di più di 3.000 dipendenti ed è entusiasta di selezionare persone altamente motivate ad una crescita professionale.

Inserita all'interno della Direzione Marketing, riportando direttamente al Responsabile di riferimento, la risorsa si occuperà di:

  • Analisi dati di vendita relativi alle performance economiche e di comportamento del cliente (dati carta fedeltà) con una logica orientata alla omnicanalità
  • Segmentazione cluster clienti
  • Creazione report commerciali
  • Interfaccia con la Direzione IT per la creazione e lo sviluppo di nuovi modelli di analisi
  • Supporto alla Direzione Acquisti e Category per guidare le scelte di business.

Requisiti

Sono Richiesti:

  • Espeirienza pregressa di almeno 3/4 anni e preferibilmente in contesti Retail/Telco
  • Laurea in discipline Ecomomico/Statistiche
  • Conoscenza SQL e Google Analytics
  • Attitudine al problem solving e orientamento al risultato
  • Capacità di lavorare in team

Altre informazioni

La selezione è rivolta ai candidati dell'uno e dell'altro sesso ai sensi del D. Lgs. 198/2006. Tutte le candidature devono essere accompagnate dalla autorizzazione al trattamento dei dati personali e saranno gestite ai sensi del Regolamento Europeo 2016/679 (c.d. GDPR).Per ulteriori informazioni circa le opportunità professionali ed il mondo di Unes Supermercati diventa follower della nostra pagina Linkedin (click su "Segui" al link https://www.linkedin.com/company/unes/).

job_data.title: Senior Analyst/Associate
job_data.descriptionHtml:
Per boutique indipendente di Debt Advisory, siamo attualmente alla ricerca di una figura di Senior Analyst/Associate da inserire all'interno del team.

Dettagli sul cliente

Boutique di piccole dimensioni leader nel settore del Debt Advisory, che fornisce assistenza ad imprese e fondi italiani ed esteri nella strutturazione di operazioni di finanziamento complesse, principalmente nei settori Energy e Infrastructure.

Descrizione

Attività principali:

  • Supporto alla strutturazione di operazioni di finanza strutturata (Project Finance, acquisition financing, mezzanine debt e corporate financing), dalla fase di analisi di fattibilità al closing finanziario
  • Predisposizione di modelli finanziari, teaser informativi e materiali di presentazione a supporto delle operazioni da sottoporre agli istituti finanziari
  • Coordinamento e analisi delle due diligence di progetto (legale, tecnica, assicurativa e di mercato) e interazione con i diversi advisor coinvolti
  • Supporto nella selezione degli istituti finanziari, nella negoziazione della documentazione finanziaria e nel perfezionamento delle operazioni
  • Partecipazione a meeting e videocall con clienti, finanziatori e consulenti, contribuendo allo sviluppo e alla gestione delle relazioni

Profilo del Candidato

Requisiti:

  • 2/3 anni di esperienza in finanza strutturata (Project Finance, acquisition financing, mezzanine, corporate) e supporto/gestione di operazioni di M&A
  • Conoscenza del segmento di rifermento (Energy&Infra)
  • Solide competenze di modellazione finanziaria, analisi di bilancio e dei flussi di cassa, con comprensione degli aspetti contabili, fiscali e legali
  • Capacità di analizzare, predisporre e negoziare documentazione finanziaria complessa (term sheet, contratti di finanziamento)
  • Ottime capacità relazionali e di lavoro in team, unite a una solida conoscenza della lingua inglese


offerta di lavoro

Ottima opportunità di carriera.

Desired Skills and Experience

Requsiti:

2/3 anni di esperienza in finanza strutturata (Project Finance, acquisition financing, mezzanine, corporate) e supporto/gestione di operazioni di M&A
Conoscenza del segmento di rifermento (Energy&Infra)
Solide competenze di modellazione finanziaria, analisi di bilancio e dei flussi di cassa, con comprensione degli aspetti contabili, fiscali e legali
Capacità di analizzare, predisporre e negoziare documentazione finanziaria complessa (term sheet, contratti di finanziamento)
Ottime capacità relazionali e di lavoro in team, unite a una solida conoscenza della lingua inglese

job_data.title: Analyst (Supply Analytics) (Bangkok-based role, Relocation provided)
job_data.descriptionHtml:
About Agoda

At Agoda, we bridge the world through travel. Our story began in 2005, when two lifelong friends and entrepreneurs, driven by their passion for travel, launched Agoda to make it easier for everyone to explore the world.

Today, we are part of Booking Holdings [NASDAQ: BKNG], with a diverse team of over 7,000 people from 90 countries, working together in offices around the globe. Every day, we connect people to destinations and experiences, with our great deals across our millions of hotels and holiday properties, flights, and experiences worldwide.

No two days are the same at Agoda. Data and technology are at the heart of our culture, fueling our curiosity and innovation. If you’re ready to begin your best journey and help build travel for the world, join us.

Get to Know our Team:

The Supply Analytics team is a team of creative entrepreneurs that develop solutions for Agoda’s accommodation partners and promote Agoda’s top and bottom line growth. We design tailored business and product solutions with our partners and help them generate measurable value. Members of our team are empowered and supported to grow their market(s) or accounts. We develop win-win relationships and leverage Agoda’s unique accommodations portfolio and tech solutions to bring our partners the advantages they seek. Utilizing our strong brand and resources, we build new channels to increase the visibility of Agoda, introduce more travelers to our great products and service and deliver significant revenues to the overall business.

The Supply Analytics team is a fast growing and dynamic team within Central Supply Team of Agoda. The team is responsible for developing and scaling a range of marketing solutions for accommodation partners focusing on growth, visibility, conversion, pricing recommendations and financial products, as well as advertising and display marketing solutions for businesses and travel organizations.

The team scope includes strategic planning, business development and sales operations, project management, contracting operations, risk assessment and collections operations, product development work and data analytics. Team members closely work with multiple internal stakeholders in product and tech, finance and legal, marketing and partner services in our HQ as well as in multiple offices around the world.

The Opportunity:

The role sits within the Supply Analytics team under SOAP team of Partner Services, where new business ideas, and partnership types are incubated and scaled. As an Analyst/Senior Analyst at Agoda you will use your data skills and business mindset to make a difference in our fast-growing global business across our top hotel partners. This role will be involved in strategic projects and work closely with commercial owners and business stakeholders, using data to identify and translate business needs and opportunities into actionable initiatives.

In this Role, you’ll get to:

  • Translate internal briefs into analytical projects (to include refining the initial brief and asking the ‘right questions’, working through potential hypotheses and storyboarding the output)
  • Use and analyze data from multiple large-scale data warehouses and present statistically strong analysis to a wide range of business stakeholders.
  • Proactively identify opportunities for growth within supply and the wider business.
  • Drive new analytical initiatives and projects aimed at improving organizational efficiency and shaping Agoda supply.
  • Identify, support, and lead projects aimed at scaling up the way the Supply organization leverages on data, insights, and intelligence.
  • Automate manual operational processes and present back on time savings gained through modernization of business operations

What you’ll Need to Succeed:

  • 2-6 years of experience in analytics/data science/insights/strategy.
  • Bachelor’s degree ideally in a business or quantitative subject (e.g. computer science, mathematics, engineering, science, economics or finance).
  • Expert domain of data analysis and data visualization tools and software such as Excel, SQL, Tableau, Python, R, or similar
  • Experience in conducting A/B testing experimentation
  • A good understanding of statistical modelling knowledge or any machine learning technique knowledge is a plus (regression, logistic regression, random forest, etc.)
  • Good stakeholder management experience. Comfortable presenting to senior leadership and C-suite.
  • Strong experience in finding data insights and provide business recommendation to the business
  • A hacker’s mindset – the ability to build simple but clever and elegant solutions to new problems within significant resource, operational and time constraints through deep understanding of the business, creative problem solving, and a wide range of expertise in data, analytics, automation, programming, and prototyping.
  • Excellent communicator with superior written, verbal, presentation and interpersonal communication skills.
  • Data driven in both decision making and performance measurement.
  • Extreme comfort in ambiguous, fast-paced environment.
  • Ability to multi-task, prioritize and coordinate resources.
  • Experience utilizing Python for Automation
  • Knowledge of Pandas and other associated analytical packages
  • An advanced level of SQL including parallel computation approaches (i.e. Spark)
  • Tableau/other BI visualization experience

It’s Great if you Have:

  • MBA or Masters in a quantitative subject (e.g. computer science, mathematics, engineering, science, economics or finance).
  • Program management certifications (e.g. PMI, PRINCE2) to compliment your program management experience.
  • Asian market experience.
  • Travel industry / e-commerce / tech / consulting experience.

Equal Opportunity Employer

At Agoda, we pride ourselves on being a company represented by people of all different backgrounds and orientations. We prioritize attracting diverse talent and cultivating an inclusive environment that encourages collaboration and innovation. Employment at Agoda is based solely on a person’s merit and qualifications. We are committed to providing equal employment opportunity regardless of sex, age, race, color, national origin, religion, marital status, pregnancy, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability, citizenship, veteran or military status, and other legally protected characteristics.

We will keep your application on file so that we can consider you for future vacancies and you can always ask to have your details removed from the file. For more details please read our privacy policy.

Disclaimer

We do not accept any terms or conditions, nor do we recognize any agency’s representation of a candidate, from unsolicited third-party or agency submissions. If we receive unsolicited or speculative CVs, we reserve the right to contact and hire the candidate directly without any obligation to pay a recruitment fee.
job_data.descriptionText:
About Agoda

At Agoda, we bridge the world through travel. Our story began in 2005, when two lifelong friends and entrepreneurs, driven by their passion for travel, launched Agoda to make it easier for everyone to explore the world.

Today, we are part of Booking Holdings [NASDAQ: BKNG], with a diverse team of over 7,000 people from 90 countries, working together in offices around the globe. Every day, we connect people to destinations and experiences, with our great deals across our millions of hotels and holiday properties, flights, and experiences worldwide.

No two days are the same at Agoda. Data and technology are at the heart of our culture, fueling our curiosity and innovation. If you’re ready to begin your best journey and help build travel for the world, join us.

Get to Know our Team:

The Supply Analytics team is a team of creative entrepreneurs that develop solutions for Agoda’s accommodation partners and promote Agoda’s top and bottom line growth. We design tailored business and product solutions with our partners and help them generate measurable value. Members of our team are empowered and supported to grow their market(s) or accounts. We develop win-win relationships and leverage Agoda’s unique accommodations portfolio and tech solutions to bring our partners the advantages they seek. Utilizing our strong brand and resources, we build new channels to increase the visibility of Agoda, introduce more travelers to our great products and service and deliver significant revenues to the overall business.

The Supply Analytics team is a fast growing and dynamic team within Central Supply Team of Agoda. The team is responsible for developing and scaling a range of marketing solutions for accommodation partners focusing on growth, visibility, conversion, pricing recommendations and financial products, as well as advertising and display marketing solutions for businesses and travel organizations.

The team scope includes strategic planning, business development and sales operations, project management, contracting operations, risk assessment and collections operations, product development work and data analytics. Team members closely work with multiple internal stakeholders in product and tech, finance and legal, marketing and partner services in our HQ as well as in multiple offices around the world.

The Opportunity: 

The role sits within the Supply Analytics team under SOAP team of Partner Services, where new business ideas, and partnership types are incubated and scaled. As an Analyst/Senior Analyst at Agoda you will use your data skills and business mindset to make a difference in our fast-growing global business across our top hotel partners. This role will be involved in strategic projects and work closely with commercial owners and business stakeholders, using data to identify and translate business needs and opportunities into actionable initiatives.

In this Role, you’ll get to:

Translate internal briefs into analytical projects (to include refining the initial brief and asking the ‘right questions’, working through potential hypotheses and storyboarding the output)Use and analyze data from multiple large-scale data warehouses and present statistically strong analysis to a wide range of business stakeholders.Proactively identify opportunities for growth within supply and the wider business.Drive new analytical initiatives and projects aimed at improving organizational efficiency and shaping Agoda supply.Identify, support, and lead projects aimed at scaling up the way the Supply organization leverages on data, insights, and intelligence.Automate manual operational processes and present back on time savings gained through modernization of business operations

What you’ll Need to Succeed:

2-6 years of experience in analytics/data science/insights/strategy.Bachelor’s degree ideally in a business or quantitative subject (e.g. computer science, mathematics, engineering, science, economics or finance).Expert domain of data analysis and data visualization tools and software such as Excel, SQL, Tableau, Python, R, or similarExperience in conducting A/B testing experimentationA good understanding of statistical modelling knowledge or any machine learning technique knowledge is a plus (regression, logistic regression, random forest, etc.)Good stakeholder management experience. Comfortable presenting to senior leadership and C-suite.Strong experience in finding data insights and provide business recommendation to the businessA hacker’s mindset – the ability to build simple but clever and elegant solutions to new problems within significant resource, operational and time constraints through deep understanding of the business, creative problem solving, and a wide range of expertise in data, analytics, automation, programming, and prototyping.Excellent communicator with superior written, verbal, presentation and interpersonal communication skills.Data driven in both decision making and performance measurement.Extreme comfort in ambiguous, fast-paced environment.Ability to multi-task, prioritize and coordinate resources.Experience utilizing Python for AutomationKnowledge of Pandas and other associated analytical packagesAn advanced level of SQL including parallel computation approaches (i.e. Spark)Tableau/other BI visualization experience

It’s Great if you Have: 

MBA or Masters in a quantitative subject (e.g. computer science, mathematics, engineering, science, economics or finance).Program management certifications (e.g. PMI, PRINCE2) to compliment your program management experience.Asian market experience.Travel industry / e-commerce / tech / consulting experience.

job_data.title: Junior Innovation Consultant / Analyst
job_data.descriptionHtml:
Ayming è una multinazionale specializzata in Servizi professionali per le aziende presente in 14 Paesi.

In Italia, ci focalizziamo su tre aree di competenza: finanziamenti per l’innovazione, tributi ambientali e compliance internazionale in materia di IVA.

Siamo la prima società di consulenza ad essere diventata una Società Benefit, e per questo ci impegniamo ogni giorno a promuovere un modello di business sostenibile, capace di generare risultati concreti e duraturi per i nostri Clienti.

Cosa vuol dire lavorare in Ayming?

Entrare a far parte di Ayming significa unirsi a un team internazionale e innovativo, dove il talento e l'expertise si combinano per offrire soluzioni di alto livello nel settore della Finanza Agevolata.

Per il nostro dipartimento Innovation Performance, stiamo cercando un Junior Innovation Analyst che voglia sviluppare competenze in un settore in crescita, lavorando su incentivi fiscali e bandi di finanziamento.

Perché unirti ad Ayming?

  • Entra in un team internazionale con esperti in finanza agevolata e fiscalità internazionale.
  • Lavora con aziende leader in Italia, supportandole nell’accesso a incentivi fiscali e finanziamenti.
  • Acquisisci esperienza pratica in progetti di consulenza strategica.
  • Approfitta di modalità di lavoro flessibili, con possibilità di smart working.

Descrizione del lavoro

Come Junior Innovation Consultant / Analyst, entrerai in un settore dinamico e stimolante, supportando il team nella gestione di agevolazioni fiscali e bandi di finanziamento. Contribuirai attivamente all’analisi dei progetti dei clienti e all’ottimizzazione delle loro opportunità di finanziamento.

Responsabilità principali:

  • Gestione autonoma e in collaborazione con colleghi più senior dei progetti assegnati, tra cui Credito d'Imposta R&S, Industria 4.0 e bandi regionali, nazionali ed europei.
  • Monitoraggio e analisi dell'evoluzione normativa in ambito fiscale e finanziamenti.
  • Partecipazione attiva nello sviluppo di nuovi servizi di consulenza innovativi.
  • Supporto tecnico al team di vendita.

Qualifiche

Il tuo profilo

  • Laurea magistrale in ambito scientifico, ingegneristico o economico (PhD è un plus).
  • 1-2 anni di esperienza in agevolazioni fiscali e bandi nazionali.
  • Ottime capacità analitiche e di problem solving.
  • Eccellenti capacità comunicative e attitudine alla collaborazione.
  • Capacità di lavorare in team e sotto pressione.
  • Ottima conoscenza di MS Office, in particolare Excel.
  • Fluente in italiano e inglese (la conoscenza di un’altra lingua europea è un plus).

Informazioni aggiuntive

HR Policy

  • Unleash your potential with our Ayming Academy and Ayming Digital Academy!
  • Grow your career with our tailored support programs, My Professional Journey or MoveWithUS.
  • Work your way: enjoy flexibility, inspiring and friendly spaces.
  • Connect and celebrate through events and gatherings all year round (Webinars, “Coffee With” etc..)

Cosa offriamo?

  • Un ambiente giovane, dinamico e internazionale.
  • Contratto a tempo indeterminato.
  • Modalità ibrida con 2 giorni in ufficio a Milano e 3 in smart working
  • Crescita professionale e formazione continua.

Vogliamo conoscere la tua personalità, la tua passione, il tuo talento!

Ti aspettiamo!

job_data.title: Corporate Coverage Analyst - GCIB
job_data.descriptionHtml:
Do you want your voice heard and your actions to count?

Discover your opportunity with Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group (MUFG), one of the world’s leading financial groups. Across the globe, we’re 150,000 colleagues, striving to make a difference for every client, organization, and community we serve. We stand for our values, building long-term relationships, serving society, and fostering shared and sustainable growth for a better world.

With a vision to be the world’s most trusted financial group, it’s part of our culture to put people first, listen to new and diverse ideas and collaborate toward greater innovation, speed and agility. This means investing in talent, technologies, and tools that empower you to own your career.

Join MUFG, where being inspired is expected and making a meaningful impact is rewarded.

About us:

GCIB Italy manages MUFG’s relationships with leading Italian corporates, financial institutions, financial sponsors, Italian subsidiaries of multinational groups and Italian companies owned by private equity or infrastructure funds.

Leveraging MUFG’s global network and comprehensive product platform, together with our product specialists we support clients across corporate finance, capital markets, structured solutions, leveraged and project finance and strategic advisory needs.

Role Overview:

We are seeking a highly motivated Analyst to join our Global Corporate & Investment Banking team in Milan. This role represents the first step in a long-term career path toward senior client coverage or product origination positions.

The Analyst will be fully integrated into the team from day one, working closely with Senior Bankers and Product Specialists and contributing directly to client activities, deal execution, and strategic initiatives.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Client Coverage & Business Origination
  • Support Senior Bankers in daily client interaction, contributing to idea generation and origination across a wide range of products.
  • Assist in identifying new business opportunities and support onboarding of prospective clients.
  • Prepare high-quality marketing materials, pitch books, and presentations for client meetings.
  • Contribute to the development and execution of Account Plans, ensuring cross-sell opportunities are maximized.
  • Draft clear and accurate call reports to maintain strong internal documentation and follow-up.
  • Deal Assessment & Execution
  • Develop a solid understanding of credit fundamentals across corporate finance, leveraged finance, project finance and fund finance.
  • Prepare Deal Screening Memos, business cases and internal submissions in collaboration with Senior Bankers and Product Partners.
  • Act as first point of contact for internal procedures, supporting execution processes including documentation coordination, checklists, compliance requirements and KYC.
  • Risk, Governance & Internal Reporting
  • Apply MUFG’s risk culture and support the risk assessment framework through thoughtful analysis and disciplined documentation.
  • Gain ownership of KYC, onboarding processes and internal reporting requirements.
  • Ensure full compliance with internal standards, governance requirements and regulatory expectations.

What We Are Looking For

Education & Experience

  • Final-year students or recent graduates (up to 12 months) are encouraged to apply.
  • Candidates with up to 2 years of experience in a top-tier financial institution are welcome; experience in Debt Advisory, Leveraged Finance, Project Finance, or related fields is an advantage but not essential.
  • Internal applicants with the right motivation and skills will also be considered.

Skills & Competencies

  • Strong motivation to work in a client-facing, high-performance environment.
  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills with the ability to collaborate across multiple teams.
  • Proactive mindset, intellectual curiosity and strong commitment to continuous learning.
  • Ability to manage multiple priorities in a dynamic environment and deliver high-quality output under time pressure.
  • Team-player mentality combined with the ability to develop independent insights and propose thoughtful solutions.
  • High proficiency with Microsoft Office tools and strong analytical capabilities.
  • Fluency in Italian and English is required; additional European languages or Japanese are a plus.

Culture & Values

Client Centric

  • Always ask the question “how does this impact our Clients?”
  • Think like our Clients and advocate for their success.
  • Listen to the voice of the Client to drive innovation.
  • Be a trusted advisor by providing thoughtful, integrated solutions to meet our Client’s unique needs.

People Focused

  • Connect beyond your Team and leverage our global strength as One MUFG.
  • Value contributions and results over titles and hierarchy.
  • Respect each other, assume good intent, and listen reflectively.
  • Develop yourself and others, learn from mistakes and recognise achievements.

Listen Up. Speak Up

  • Actively listen to diverse perspectives before voicing opinions or making decisions.
  • Ask the difficult questions to stretch our thinking and expand our mind-set.
  • Call out behaviours that don’t align with our values, conduct and culture.
  • Propose innovative ideas even when they may be unpopular.

Innovate & Simplify

  • Be resilient and challenge the status quo to support transformation and innovation.
  • Simplify what does not need to be complex.
  • Be curious about what’s next and doing it better.
  • Expect efficiency and manage Company resources as if they were your own.

Own & Execute

  • Execute with speed, simplicity and transparency to manage risk and drive results.
  • Empower those closest to the issue to solve it.
  • Be accountable for your actions and accept responsibility.
  • Pro-actively prioritize competing objectives to deliver high performance.

What We Offer

Joining GCIB Italy means becoming part of a high-performing, globally connected platform where talent is recognised, supported and accelerated. We offer:

  • A steep learning curve and meaningful responsibility from day one, with direct exposure to senior bankers, product experts and top-tier clients.
  • A structured development path, including technical and soft-skill training, mentorship, on-the-job learning and access to MUFG’s global knowledge network.
  • Broad client and product exposure, across corporate lending, leveraged finance, project finance, structured solutions and international coverage teams.
  • A collaborative and inclusive culture, where individual contribution is valued and teamwork is at the core of success.
  • Career growth opportunities, with a long-term development track designed to progress toward Associate and Senior roles within Client Coverage or Product Origination.
  • International perspective, through interaction with MUFG colleagues across EMEA, the Americas and Asia.
  • Competitive compensation and benefits, aligned with the standards of leading global financial institutions.
  • A modern hybrid working model (1 day per week remote), designed to support productivity, personal development and team cohesion.

We are open to considering flexible working requests in line with organisational requirements.

MUFG is committed to embracing diversity and building an inclusive culture where all employees are valued, respected and their opinions count. We support the principles of equality, diversity and inclusion in recruitment and employment, and oppose all forms of discrimination on the grounds of age, sex, gender, sexual orientation, disability, pregnancy and maternity, race, gender reassignment, religion or belief and marriage or civil partnership.

We make our recruitment decisions in a non-discriminatory manner in accordance with our commitment to identifying the right skills for the right role and our obligations under the law.

job_data.title: Senior Forecasting & Planning Analyst (Bangkok-Based)
job_data.descriptionHtml:
About Agoda

At Agoda, we bridge the world through travel. Our story began in 2005, when two lifelong friends and entrepreneurs, driven by their passion for travel, launched Agoda to make it easier for everyone to explore the world.

Today, we are part of Booking Holdings [NASDAQ: BKNG], with a diverse team of over 7,000 people from 90 countries, working together in offices around the globe. Every day, we connect people to destinations and experiences, with our great deals across our millions of hotels and holiday properties, flights, and experiences worldwide.

No two days are the same at Agoda. Data and technology are at the heart of our culture, fueling our curiosity and innovation. If you’re ready to begin your best journey and help build travel for the world, join us.

Get to Know our Team:

Agoda has been one of the fastest growing online travel agencies in the world in recent years, expanding our global reach as well as our portfolio of travel-related products. A critical driver to this success has been the Agoda Finance team. Within the FP&A team, we are responsible for providing insightful and actionable intel to the senior management team across the company, to facilitate effective decision-making . Having experimentation and data analysis deeply ingrained in our culture, we provide the strategic insights Agoda’s business leaders need to push into new territories in sustainable and scalable ways. We also prioritize career development in Agoda Finance. Every function within the team has a well-defined career track with clear goals and development targets each step of the way.

The Opportunity:

The Senior FP&A Analyst reports into the Senior FP&A Manager and involves close collaboration with many of the key leaders within the business, as well as the rest of the FP&A team and the wider Finance organization.

The rapid growth of the business and the increasing complexity driven by new launches and services make this role an exciting, interesting, and very challenging proposition. Expected to help drive performance, build plans for the future, as well as manage regular reporting, forecasting, and general planning. The role is very broad-based and will require an individual who is motivated to make a big impact.

In This Role, You’ll Get To:

  • Add immediate value and support the organisation during an exciting and dynamic growth phase
  • Support the forecast process in conjunction with key stakeholders, and in collaboration with the rest of the FP&A team
  • Work with the Team Lead to manage a rolling monthly forecast model and provide timely insights into performance against budget/forecast
  • Prepare segments of reports to the Board, Shareholders and Advisers as required and directed from time to time
  • Co-develop incisive analysis and reporting to give insights to business performance and trends, including use of KPIs and OKRs
  • Undertake additional planning and budgeting activities as required
  • Enhance the understanding and key levers of the Agoda business
  • Support the delivery of annual budgets, quarterly guidance, and monthly and weekly forecasts as well as related financial planning & analysis
  • Provide financial analysis (FP&A) & commentary on month-end financials & KPIs

What You’ll Need to Succeed:

    • Minimum 4 years in accounting or related fields, 2 years in FP&A
    • Chartered Accountant qualified: ACA or CIMA, or equivalent
    • Hands on experience of using EPM/BPM systems (planning tools)
    • Exceptional Excel and financial modelling skills
    • Ability to take ownership, to work independently and to meet tight deadlines with a logical, methodical approach to prioritising tasks and responsibilities
    • Demonstrable success at developing quality insights for non-finance management teams, ideally gained in an e-commerce company
    • Commercially aware, able to think both analytically and strategically, to think logically about underlying business issues
    • Pro-active in resolving queries and problems and highlighting future potential areas of risk
    • A willingness to get involved in the business to understand the story behind the numbers
    • Digital, ecommerce, travel backgrounds preferable

About Agoda

At Agoda, we bridge the world through travel. Our story began in 2005, when two lifelong friends and entrepreneurs, driven by their passion for travel, launched Agoda to make it easier for everyone to explore the world.

Today, we are part of Booking Holdings [NASDAQ: BKNG], with a diverse team of over 7,000 people from 90 countries, working together in offices around the globe. Every day, we connect people to destinations and experiences, with our great deals across our millions of hotels and holiday properties, flights, and experiences worldwide.

No two days are the same at Agoda. Data and technology are at the heart of our culture, fueling our curiosity and innovation. If you’re ready to begin your best journey and help build travel for the world, join us.

Get to Know our Team:

Agoda has been one of the fastest growing online travel agencies in the world in recent years, expanding our global reach as well as our portfolio of travel-related products. A critical driver to this success has been the Agoda Finance team. Within the FP&A team, we are responsible for providing insightful and actionable intel to the senior management team across the company, to facilitate effective decision-making . Having experimentation and data analysis deeply ingrained in our culture, we provide the strategic insights Agoda’s business leaders need to push into new territories in sustainable and scalable ways. We also prioritize career development in Agoda Finance. Every function within the team has a well-defined career track with clear goals and development targets each step of the way.

job_data.title: Business Credit Analyst
job_data.descriptionHtml:
Guber Banca è una challenger bank innovativa, dinamica e in rapida crescita dove il digitale si fonde con il fattore umano. Nati oltre 30 anni fa come operatore specializzato nel credit management, dal 2018 siamo la prima banca italiana ad aver ricevuto ex novo l’autorizzazione dalla Banca Centrale Europea.

Il nostro approccio al mercato e la nostra capacità di adattarci alle più diverse situazioni, ci ha permesso di crescere e di diventare una banca innovativa, moderna e solida.

Il nostro core business è rappresentato da soluzioni sartoriali per supportare le imprese: dalla gestione di NPL e UTP si sono infatti affiancati nuovi business come, tra gli altri, operazioni finanziarie in special situation, acquisto di crediti erariali, factoring evoluto, advisory, due diligence e consulenza in ambito real estate.

La nostra vera forza risiede in un team composto da persone che, tra le sedi di Milano e Brescia, lavora insieme per costruire il futuro con grande entusiasmo e professionalità: «Guber Banca: digital but human first».

Passione, innovazione, Flessibilità e Rispetto sono valori che rispecchiano il nostro modo di intendere il lavoro. Se ti piacciono le sfide, sei nel posto giusto!

Posizione

Siamo alla ricerca di una persona analitica e metodica da inserire nel nostro team per ottimizzare l'intero ciclo di vita del credito, agendo come ponte tra le esigenze di business, la normativa e l’infrastruttura tecnologica.

Il tuo ruolo

In qualità di Business Credit Analyst, sarai il motore del miglioramento continuo dei nostri processi creditizi. Non ti limiterai all'analisi teorica, ma avrai un ruolo attivo nella configurazione delle piattaforme IT per tradurre le strategie della Banca in flussi operativi efficienti.

Le Attività Principali

  • Mappatura e Ottimizzazione: Analizzare i processi di valutazione, concessione e gestione del credito per ridurre tempi di lavorazione e rischi operativi;
  • Configurazione IT: Impostare logiche di processo, parametri e tabelle sulle piattaforme bancarie per garantire agilità e conformità normativa;
  • Allineamento Normativo: Supporto nella revisione delle policy interne per assicurarne la fattibilità tecnica e l’integrazione nei sistemi informatici;
  • Data Integration: Collaborare con uffici interni e provider esterni per ottimizzare il flusso di dati e l’integrazione delle piattaforme.

Requisiti

La persona che cerchiamo possiede:

  • Formazione: Laurea in Ingegneria Gestionale, Economia o altre facoltà STEM.
  • Esperienza: Da 1 a 5 anni in ruoli analoghi (Back office bancario, Internal Audit, Consulenza o analisi di processi organizzativi).
  • Competenze Tecniche:
  • Ottima conoscenza del linguaggio SQL e dei database relazionali.
  • Padronanza avanzata di Excel e PowerBI.
  • Familiarità con i modelli di dati.
  • Estremamente precisa, con un approccio metodico, organizzato, strutturato e capacità di comunicare le proprie idee in modo proattivo.
  • Buona conoscenza della lingua inglese.

Cosa consideriamo un "Plus"

  • Interesse per l'informatica e la programmazione.
  • Conoscenza pregressa del settore bancario e della normativa sui crediti.

Perché scegliere questa opportunità?

Entrerai in un contesto che valorizza l'autonomia e il pensiero critico. Avrai la possibilità di contribuire direttamente sull'efficienza operativa della Banca, lavorando in un ambiente che supporta l'equilibrio vita-lavoro.

CCNL Commercio, contratto a tempo indeterminato e 2 gg di smart working a settimana.

Altre Informazioni

Siamo convinti che la manifestazione dell’individualità e creatività sia un acceleratore dell’innovazione e, pertanto, un fattore decisivo per la crescita e la sostenibilità del Banca.

Guber Banca opera per favorire un’ampia diffusione della cultura necessaria a garantire, all’interno della propria organizzazione, un ambiente inclusivo che non discrimini per genere, età, diversa abilità, stato di salute, etnia, provenienza geografica, orientamento e identità sessuale o ideologie politiche e promuove questi valori per tutelare la massima espressione del potenziale del singolo quale elemento distintivo e funzionale alla crescita del Banca.

job_data.title: Analyst/Senior Analyst (Supply Analytics) (Bangkok-based role, Relocation provided)
job_data.descriptionHtml:
About Agoda

At Agoda, we bridge the world through travel. Our story began in 2005, when two lifelong friends and entrepreneurs, driven by their passion for travel, launched Agoda to make it easier for everyone to explore the world.

Today, we are part of Booking Holdings [NASDAQ: BKNG], with a diverse team of over 7,000 people from 90 countries, working together in offices around the globe. Every day, we connect people to destinations and experiences, with our great deals across our millions of hotels and holiday properties, flights, and experiences worldwide.

No two days are the same at Agoda. Data and technology are at the heart of our culture, fueling our curiosity and innovation. If you’re ready to begin your best journey and help build travel for the world, join us.

Get to Know our Team:

The Supply Analytics team is a team of creative entrepreneurs that develop solutions for Agoda’s accommodation partners and promote Agoda’s top and bottom line growth. We design tailored business and product solutions with our partners and help them generate measurable value. Members of our team are empowered and supported to grow their market(s) or accounts. We develop win-win relationships and leverage Agoda’s unique accommodations portfolio and tech solutions to bring our partners the advantages they seek. Utilizing our strong brand and resources, we build new channels to increase the visibility of Agoda, introduce more travelers to our great products and service and deliver significant revenues to the overall business.

The Supply Analytics team is a fast growing and dynamic team within Central Supply Team of Agoda. The team is responsible for developing and scaling a range of marketing solutions for accommodation partners focusing on growth, visibility, conversion, pricing recommendations and financial products, as well as advertising and display marketing solutions for businesses and travel organizations.

The team scope includes strategic planning, business development and sales operations, project management, contracting operations, risk assessment and collections operations, product development work and data analytics. Team members closely work with multiple internal stakeholders in product and tech, finance and legal, marketing and partner services in our HQ as well as in multiple offices around the world.

The Opportunity:

The role sits within the Supply Analytics team under SOAP team of Partner Services, where new business ideas, and partnership types are incubated and scaled. As an Analyst/Senior Analyst at Agoda you will use your data skills and business mindset to make a difference in our fast-growing global business across our top hotel partners. This role will be involved in strategic projects and work closely with commercial owners and business stakeholders, using data to identify and translate business needs and opportunities into actionable initiatives.

In this Role, you’ll get to:

  • Translate internal briefs into analytical projects (to include refining the initial brief and asking the ‘right questions’, working through potential hypotheses and storyboarding the output)
  • Use and analyze data from multiple large-scale data warehouses and present statistically strong analysis to a wide range of business stakeholders.
  • Proactively identify opportunities for growth within supply and the wider business.
  • Drive new analytical initiatives and projects aimed at improving organizational efficiency and shaping Agoda supply.
  • Identify, support, and lead projects aimed at scaling up the way the Supply organization leverages on data, insights, and intelligence.
  • Automate manual operational processes and present back on time savings gained through modernization of business operations

What you’ll Need to Succeed:

  • 2-6+ years of experience in analytics/data science/insights/strategy.
  • Bachelor’s degree ideally in a business or quantitative subject (e.g. computer science, mathematics, engineering, science, economics or finance).
  • Expert domain of data analysis and data visualization tools and software such as Excel, SQL, Tableau, Python, R, or similar
  • Experience in conducting A/B testing experimentation
  • A good understanding of statistical modelling knowledge or any machine learning technique knowledge is a plus (regression, logistic regression, random forest, etc.)
  • Good stakeholder management experience. Comfortable presenting to senior leadership and C-suite.
  • Strong experience in finding data insights and provide business recommendation to the business
  • A hacker’s mindset – the ability to build simple but clever and elegant solutions to new problems within significant resource, operational and time constraints through deep understanding of the business, creative problem solving, and a wide range of expertise in data, analytics, automation, programming, and prototyping.
  • Excellent communicator with superior written, verbal, presentation and interpersonal communication skills.
  • Data driven in both decision making and performance measurement.
  • Extreme comfort in ambiguous, fast-paced environment.
  • Ability to multi-task, prioritize and coordinate resources.
  • Experience utilizing Python for Automation
  • Knowledge of Pandas and other associated analytical packages
  • An advanced level of SQL including parallel computation approaches (i.e. Spark)
  • Tableau/other BI visualization experience

It’s Great if you Have:

  • MBA or Masters in a quantitative subject (e.g. computer science, mathematics, engineering, science, economics or finance).
  • Program management certifications (e.g. PMI, PRINCE2) to compliment your program management experience.
  • Asian market experience.
  • Travel industry / e-commerce / tech / consulting experience.

job_data.descriptionText:
About Agoda

At Agoda, we bridge the world through travel. Our story began in 2005, when two lifelong friends and entrepreneurs, driven by their passion for travel, launched Agoda to make it easier for everyone to explore the world.

Today, we are part of Booking Holdings [NASDAQ: BKNG], with a diverse team of over 7,000 people from 90 countries, working together in offices around the globe. Every day, we connect people to destinations and experiences, with our great deals across our millions of hotels and holiday properties, flights, and experiences worldwide.

No two days are the same at Agoda. Data and technology are at the heart of our culture, fueling our curiosity and innovation. If you’re ready to begin your best journey and help build travel for the world, join us.

Get to Know our Team:

The Supply Analytics team is a team of creative entrepreneurs that develop solutions for Agoda’s accommodation partners and promote Agoda’s top and bottom line growth. We design tailored business and product solutions with our partners and help them generate measurable value. Members of our team are empowered and supported to grow their market(s) or accounts. We develop win-win relationships and leverage Agoda’s unique accommodations portfolio and tech solutions to bring our partners the advantages they seek. Utilizing our strong brand and resources, we build new channels to increase the visibility of Agoda, introduce more travelers to our great products and service and deliver significant revenues to the overall business.

The Supply Analytics team is a fast growing and dynamic team within Central Supply Team of Agoda. The team is responsible for developing and scaling a range of marketing solutions for accommodation partners focusing on growth, visibility, conversion, pricing recommendations and financial products, as well as advertising and display marketing solutions for businesses and travel organizations.

The team scope includes strategic planning, business development and sales operations, project management, contracting operations, risk assessment and collections operations, product development work and data analytics. Team members closely work with multiple internal stakeholders in product and tech, finance and legal, marketing and partner services in our HQ as well as in multiple offices around the world.

The Opportunity: 

The role sits within the Supply Analytics team under SOAP team of Partner Services, where new business ideas, and partnership types are incubated and scaled. As an Analyst/Senior Analyst at Agoda you will use your data skills and business mindset to make a difference in our fast-growing global business across our top hotel partners. This role will be involved in strategic projects and work closely with commercial owners and business stakeholders, using data to identify and translate business needs and opportunities into actionable initiatives.

In this Role, you’ll get to:

Translate internal briefs into analytical projects (to include refining the initial brief and asking the ‘right questions’, working through potential hypotheses and storyboarding the output)Use and analyze data from multiple large-scale data warehouses and present statistically strong analysis to a wide range of business stakeholders.Proactively identify opportunities for growth within supply and the wider business.Drive new analytical initiatives and projects aimed at improving organizational efficiency and shaping Agoda supply.Identify, support, and lead projects aimed at scaling up the way the Supply organization leverages on data, insights, and intelligence.Automate manual operational processes and present back on time savings gained through modernization of business operations

What you’ll Need to Succeed:

2-6+ years of experience in analytics/data science/insights/strategy.Bachelor’s degree ideally in a business or quantitative subject (e.g. computer science, mathematics, engineering, science, economics or finance).Expert domain of data analysis and data visualization tools and software such as Excel, SQL, Tableau, Python, R, or similarExperience in conducting A/B testing experimentationA good understanding of statistical modelling knowledge or any machine learning technique knowledge is a plus (regression, logistic regression, random forest, etc.)Good stakeholder management experience. Comfortable presenting to senior leadership and C-suite.Strong experience in finding data insights and provide business recommendation to the businessA hacker’s mindset – the ability to build simple but clever and elegant solutions to new problems within significant resource, operational and time constraints through deep understanding of the business, creative problem solving, and a wide range of expertise in data, analytics, automation, programming, and prototyping.Excellent communicator with superior written, verbal, presentation and interpersonal communication skills.Data driven in both decision making and performance measurement.Extreme comfort in ambiguous, fast-paced environment.Ability to multi-task, prioritize and coordinate resources.Experience utilizing Python for AutomationKnowledge of Pandas and other associated analytical packagesAn advanced level of SQL including parallel computation approaches (i.e. Spark)Tableau/other BI visualization experience

It’s Great if you Have: 

MBA or Masters in a quantitative subject (e.g. computer science, mathematics, engineering, science, economics or finance).Program management certifications (e.g. PMI, PRINCE2) to compliment your program management experience.Asian market experience.Travel industry / e-commerce / tech / consulting experience.
